title: Cat Escape
description: Play Cat Escape, the viral cat puzzle hide-and-seek game now free online! Sneak past guards, dodge traps, and guide your kitty to safety across hundreds of stealth levels. Unlock skins, collect coins, and outsmart enemies in this browser cat game loved worldwide. Want the full mobile experience? Discover more at CatEscapeTheGame.com

title: Farm Tiles Harvest
description: Dive into 'Farm Tiles Harvest,' an engaging tile-matching game set in a quaint farm setting! Draw up to 9 tiles featuring fruits, veggies, and farming tools. Try to draw 3 similar tiles to clear them, or drawing the 9th tile will end the game. Shuffle tiles to reveal hidden ones, and complete each level within the time limit. Can you harvest them all?

title: Koko Loco Block Blast
description: Think fast, blast smart — can you beat your best score? Blast blocks, fit shapes, and outsmart the grid in this fast-paced puzzle challenge! Every move counts: clear space, chain combos, and keep the board from filling up. With smooth controls, colorful blocks, and quick rounds, it’s perfect for casual fun or deep strategy. Easy to pick up, hard to put down — how high can you climb the high score ladder?

title: Robbie: Stand on the Right Color!
description:
Welcome to the vibrant world of speed and reaction!
You are about to be tested on your attentiveness and lightning-fast decisions. Your task is simple but tricky: step on the right color before the floor disappears beneath your feet!
Suitable for anyone who loves fast, simple, and addictive games.
Are you ready to help Robbie stand his ground?

title: Super Tank Wrestle
description: Welcome to the world of tank battles, where you can control tanks to fight with other enemies on different maps. There are also a wealth of tanks for you to choose from!

title: Furry Wedding Proposal
description: Hi, young stylist! You will find a very unusual couple in love - a brutal fox and a feminine bunny - who are preparing for their future wedding. They dream of looking stunning on this holiday and you will become their main assistant in this exciting adventure! You have to dress the characters in beautiful wedding dresses, choose stylish hairstyles for them and apply light makeup. Create, fantasize and create a fairy tale!

title: Barbee Black Friday Fashion
description: Get ready for a fashion-filled shopping day with Barbee Black Friday Fashion, the ultimate dress-up experience for style lovers! Barbee is hitting the mall for the biggest sale of the year, and she needs your expert fashion sense to shine. Explore chic winterwear, cozy sweaters, stylish boots, and dazzling accessories.

title: Mojicon Winter Connect
description:
The Mojicon series returns for the holidays! Match festive tiles, break the new Ice Sheet blockers, and enjoy a relaxing winter puzzle adventure. ❄️
Mojicon Winter Connect takes the classic Onet matching fun you love and covers it in a layer of fresh snow. Immerse yourself in a cozy holiday atmosphere, connecting festive icons like reindeer, gingerbread men, and happy snowmen.
Fast, satisfying, and full of seasonal charm – it’s the perfect winter puzzle for all ages. ✨✨✨

title: Kiss O Neck
description:
Kiss O Neck: Stretch, Kiss, and Laugh Out Loud
Each level brings a new, funny, and totally unexpected situation.
You never know what’s going to happen when you stretch that neck a little further

title: Radical Rappelling
description:
Feel the rush and hold on tight as Radical Rappelling is back!

Join Rip and Roxy as you rappel down mountains at breakneck speed using your rapid reflexes.

Pull off death-defying tricks by ricocheting between launch pads, riding rainbows and rocketing over obstacles in the most redonkulous adventure ever.

Rack up coins and complete rockin’ missions to unlock sweet new gear for Rip and Roxy, the most fearless risk-takers on the planet.

title: Bus Color Jam
description: Welcome to Bus Color Jam, a lively and colorful online game that challenges your coordination and quick thinking. Guide passengers to the right buses by matching their colors and keeping the station running smoothly. Every level brings new challenges that test your timing and attention. It’s a fun mix of strategy and reflexes — easy to learn, satisfying to master, and completely free to play on both your phone and computer.

title: Dino Idle Park
description: Dino Idle Park is a relaxing leisure real estate tycoon where you create and develop a dinosaur amusement park. Expand plots, release and display dinosaurs, optimize queues and parks, hire staff, and upgrade investments to increase funds and income. Balance safety, visitor happiness, and research to keep the park thriving even when youre away.

title: Lion Family Sim Online
description: Step into the wild and rule the savannah in Lion Family Sim Online. It’s a full animal simulation adventure where you live the life of a mighty lion. Build and grow your own lion family, explore vast open landscapes, and face thrilling challenges. Hunt for food to survive, protect your territory, and lead your pride with strength and strategy.

title: Hoard Master Online
description: This is an upgrade and construction simulation game in which Empty is the protagonist. Use it to devour everything you want in exchange for money. Build and upgrade your black holes and territories!

title: Epic Stunts PvP 3D
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning muscle car through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Basketball Fever
description:
Get ready for endless basketball fun! Basketball Fever features four exciting basketball challenges anyone can enjoy. 

Sharpen your aim, beat your high score, or just enjoy quick bursts of arcade-style fun, Basketball Fever delivers nonstop action that’s easy to pick up and hard to put down. It’s the ultimate way to test your reflexes, timing, and accuracy.

Simple controls, smooth gameplay, and satisfying physics make every shot feel rewarding.

title: Wave Dash : Geometry Arrow
description: Ride the wave in Wave Dash, a rhythm platformer where each tap steers your arrow through tight corridors. Read patterns in waves, time jumps to music, and beat brutal stages. Build routes with the level editor, share creations, unlock icons, chase ranks, and perfect speed runs. Simple controls, fast restarts—pure focus and flow. Inspired by classic geometry platformers, tuned for dash mastery.

title: Color Sand Puzzle
description: Welcome to Color Sand Puzzle! Relax and unwind with Color Sand Puzzle, a refreshing take on the classic block puzzle game! Your mission is simple yet fun—fill the grid with matching colors of sand to clear and control the lines. As colorful sand blocks fall from the top, you’ll need to strategically arrange them to form complete horizontal rows. When the sand lines up from left to right, they disappear, and you earn points!

title: Blast Cubes
description: Blast Cubes is an addictive puzzle game where players strategically place cubes on a grid. When cubes align in horizontal or vertical rows, they explode, triggering an exciting chain reaction! After the explosion, characters of the same color as the exploded cube emerge and move towards vehicles of the same color waiting at the top. Once the vehicles are filled, new ones appear, continuing the cycle.

title: Card Solitaire: Word Game
description:
Train your brain in a fun new way with Card Solitaire: Word Game — a clever blend of card sorting, word puzzles, and logic challenges!
Explore the exciting world of word solitaire, packed with clever associations, tricky word sort levels, and fun topic sort puzzles.

title: Neon Gravity
description:
Defy gravity in this intense neon-soaked arcade runner! In Neon Gravity, your goal is to survive as long as possible by switching gravity to avoid deadly spikes, saws, and mines.

Master the timing to pass safely between rotating gears and trigger the "Perfect" bonus for massive points. As your score increases, the game speeds up, testing your reflexes to the limit. Can you unlock all 10 unique skins, including the Ninja and the Eye?

title: MMA Super Fight
description: The crowd is roaring, the spotlight is on you. From rookie to legend — face endless fights, unlock unique fighters and upgrade power, defense, health and regeneration. With every match, the pressure rises. The ring never sleeps and neither can you.

title: Brainrot Mega Parkour
description: Step into the wildest parkour adventure yet. Brainrot Mega Parkour brings together four intense modes, forty handcrafted levels, and a cast of hilarious characters in a single high-speed package. Whether you’re climbing an endless tower, racing across a platform full of traps, escaping a rolling lava ball, or surviving a lava flood, every level pushes your reflexes and timing to the limit.

title: Grunge Chic Alt Fashion
description:
Step into the edgy world of Grunge Chic Alt Fashion, where style meets attitude. This dress-up game lets you explore the perfect mix of grunge edge and chic sophistication.

From plaid skirts and ripped jeans to oversized jackets, fishnets, and combat boots—you’ll have endless options to design your alternative fashion star. Top it off with smoky makeup, bold lipstick, and layered accessories to complete the vibe.

title: Screw Spin
description:
Screw Spin is a satisfying logic puzzle where you unscrew colorful bolts and sort them into matching boxes. It’s relaxing yet challenging, combining planning, logic, and a touch of strategy.

Each level introduces a new layout with bolts of different colors. Your goal is to clear the entire panel by removing all the bolts, carefully managing your limited storage slots and placing each bolt in the correct container.

title: Running In Foam
description: Welcome to the wonderful world of "Running In Foam"! Everything here is made of soft, colorful foam. You'll play as a cute character, racing through foam-filled tracks. You need to nimbly jump over giant foam obstacles, slide down slippery foam slides, and collect shiny gems to unlock new characters and power-ups. The game is fast-paced with fresh, adorable graphics, and every run is full of surprises and fun. Be careful not to get lost in the foam!

title: Labuba Halloween Infestation
description: Monsters are invading Halloween! You must destroy them all — the fate of Halloween is in your hands. The game features three different modes, each with tougher and more powerful monsters.

title: Darts Jam
description:
This is a casual game of shooting balloons with darts.

When all the darts are pulled out, the board will also fall. When all the boards fall, the game is won.

The game is easy and simple to play, and the difficulty is getting stronger and stronger, which is challenging

title: Void Orbit
description: Void Orbit is an addictive space arcade game where you orbit a central core and dodge incoming enemies. Tap to reverse direction and survive as long as possible! Unlock cool skins, dynamic themes, enjoy challenging modes like Echo Mirage and Tower Build. Multi-language support for global players. Free to play, endless fun!

title: Parking Driver
description: Ever struggled to find a parking spot? In "Parking Driver," you'll face tricky parking challenges! From tight parallel parking to complex reverse maneuvers, you need precise control to avoid obstacles and park perfectly in the shortest time. The game features a realistic physics engine and diverse level designs, each testing your patience and skill. Come prove your driving prowess, unlock cool new cars, and conquer every parking lot!

title: Animal Blocks
description: Enter the colorful and cheerful world of Animal Blocks, where adorable creatures bring classic block puzzles to life. Match three or more of the same animal blocks to clear the board, earn points, and climb to higher scores. Simple to play yet full of fun challenges, this free online game is perfect for both mobile and desktop players who enjoy relaxing, strategic gameplay and charming visuals.

title: Bubble Piggies
description: Bubbles Piggies is an engaging bubble shooter game with 50 levels. Free all piggies to complete the levels. When there are no piggies left in the tube the level will drop down 1 floor. Each level will face challenging features like the sleeping piggy, the hidden piggy, the powerup bubble, the moving bubble and more.

title: Pool Master
description: From a rookie with a cue to a legend of the table, journey through 100 challenging levels with closed pockets, special balls to clear and more. Unlock custom gear, gain special boosts and rule the table with precision and power.

title: Circuit Master
description: Circuit Master is a puzzle game where you aim to get a green light by connecting the circuit correctly! Arrange the wires, fans, and machines in the right places, then turn on the button to see the electricity flow. Only the correctly connected circuit will make the green light shine. Use hints if you need help.

title: Stickman Adventure
description: This is an adventure that will take you through time and space! Along the way, you'll encounter various traps and monsters; you'll need to defeat them and rescue your friends. Come on, Hero, a whole new world awaits!

title: Arcade GP
description: ARCADE GP is a retro-style top-down Formula 1 racing game with strategic tire management and pit stop mechanics. Race against AI opponents, manage tire wear, and make tactical decisions to claim victory!

title: Woods of Nevia: Forest Survival
description: Woods of Nevia: Forest Survival is a one-tap action adventure where you battle and survive in the wild. Wield your axe to fend off wolves, chop wood, and build shelter as you explore for resources and hidden chests. Level up, choose upgrades, and outlast growing dangers while managing hunger and health in this engaging forest challenge.

title: Wood Screw Puzzle
description: Wood Screw Puzzle is a satisfying logic game where you untangle wood screws, nuts, and bolts from clever wooden structures. Each level challenges your spatial thinking as you analyze, plan, and carefully unscrew fasteners in the right order. Beautiful visuals and tactile mechanics make every puzzle feel rewarding and immersive.

title: Bubble Sky
description: Bubble Sky is an ascending Bubble Shooter game that will take you to dizzying heights. Will you be able to reach space? Reach a score of 200000 points to unlock the wheel of fortune and win collectible cards to complete your album!

title: Park Me: Draw Path
description: "Park Me: Draw Path" is a casual puzzle game integrating "painting + parking + puzzle solving", which adds "drawing lines" to the traditional parking gameplay, testing the player's logical thinking, spatial imagination and path planning ability, and getting an "intellectual exercise" in a short period of time.

title: Blue VS Red
description: Sort blue and red items as fast as you can! Drag or use arrow keys to send each item to the correct zone. Build combos, beat the timer, and earn coins to buy power-ups. Challenge yourself in solo mode or compete against AI bots. How high can you score in 30 seconds?

title: Underwater Survival
description:
Dive Into a Mysterious and Beautiful Underwater World
Welcome to an unforgettable underwater survival adventure where exploration, discovery, and survival come together in a stunning ocean environment. Dive deep into a vibrant and mysterious sea filled with hidden secrets, breathtaking visuals, and endless possibilities.

title: Car Vs Zombies
description:
Car vs Zombie is a fast-paced low-poly survival game where you smash through endless zombie waves with your car, build turrets, and defend your base from the undead horde! 
Get ready for non-stop action in Car vs Zombie, a low-poly, cartoony survival game where chaos meets fun!
Will you survive the apocalypse — or become zombie food?

title: Idle Game Prison Life
description: Ever dreamed of running your prison? Now’s your chance! In this casual idle simulator, you’ll create a high-security prison empire. Upgrade and expand until you are on your way to becoming a tycoon! Create the perfect prison layout with cells, kitchens, gyms, and surveillance! Recruit guards, medics, and more to keep things under control.

title: Save little red hood
description:
Match-3 puzzles combined with physics-based gameplay: eliminate blocks to make stones fall and become Little Red Riding Hood's weapons, which she then uses to attack the wolf.
Plan your elimination route carefully, utilizing gravity to make the stones fall and become weapons—that's the ultimate goal. Various power-ups can also help you.

title: Hexa Stack Christmas
description: Get into the holiday spirit with Hexa Stack Christmas: a festive twist on the classic hexagon-stacking puzzle game. Place the Christmas-themed hexagon tiles stacks onto the board and sort the same color tiles to collect them. The game combines a light puzzle that requires attention and logic — perfect for relaxing while stimulating your brain. 2 game modes, infinite levels, a user-friendly interface, and save support let you play anytime without losing progress.

title: Capybara Suika
description:
Capybara Suika is a fun and relaxing food merge puzzle game starring adorable capybaras!
Inspired by the viral Suika Game, drop and merge food to grow bigger and score higher.
With colorful visuals, cozy vibes, and a tiny game size, it’s the perfect lite game to enjoy anytime!

title: iTileZen sort puzzle
description: iTileZen Sort Puzzle  is a fresh and addictive puzzle game that blends the strategic color sorting mechanics with the satisfying tile-matching gameplay. Moves  colorful tiles to complete objectives before time runs out! Whether you love logic puzzles or fast-paced matching challenges, this game offers the best of both worlds.

title: Gift Merge Santa World Tour
description:
Gift Merge: Santa World Tour

Help Santa spread Christmas joy across the globe!
Tap to generate gifts, merge identical items to craft new toys, and fulfill children’s wishes to raise each country’s happiness. Travel from snowy towns to sunny beaches, unlocking new festive destinations. Merge, match, and make magic — the more joy you spread, the closer Santa gets to completing his world tour!

title: Fix Da Brainrot
description: Fix Da Brainrot is a quirky jigsaw puzzle game with pieces that look like torn paper. Pick your challenge —16 pieces for a quick and easy fix or 32 pieces for a real brain teaser. Drag, drop, and fit the torn pieces together, and watch the picture slowly come alive as you fix the brainrot and conquer the puzzle!

title: Match Factory
description: Welcome to Match Factory - the most relaxing and non-stop casual triple puzzle game. Step into a vibrant factory full of colorful items, and play the role of a master matcher. Match three identical items to clear them from the board, pack them up, and keep the factory running smoothly! Every level is uniquely designed with tricky layouts and challenges. Use power-ups that help you overcome difficult puzzles!

title: The Flowers: Merge and Sell Bouquets
description: Combine flowers in the relaxing atmosphere of a summer garden and earn coins! Sell your bouquets to customers and clear your garden of unwanted flowers with your pruning shears! Earn more coins than other players to take a place on the leaderboard!

title: BURGER CATCH
description: Move the tray left and right to collect the ordered ingredients! If time runs out or you collect too many extra ingredients, you will lose hearts. If you run out of hearts, it's game over.

title: Block Blaster Puzzle
description: Aim for high scores or complete level objectives. Rotate and arrange blocks to clear rows and columns while enjoying stunning visuals. Each perfect move brings satisfaction, challenging you to beat your best and master each puzzle!

title: Merge Tower Hero
description: Dive into Merge Tower Hero, an exhilarating online puzzle - Merge game that sharpens your mathematical thinking while exhilaratingly combining action, strategy, and combat. Assemble your team and tackle challenging battles that require not only strength but clever gameplay strategies to prevail!

title: Flower Shop
description: Match 6 of the same flowers to ship them! You can place your flowers in any empty spot on the board. Place a flower next to a tray with the same kind to make them merge. When the right conditions are met, customers will come by to visit! Complete their requests to earn rewards. The game ends when there’s no more space left to place flowers.

title: Island Expander
description:
Island Expander — relaxing crafting game. Collect resources, discover 30+ recipes, and grow your island step by step!
It is a cozy crafting game where you transform a tiny island into a paradise.
Collect resources, unlock recipes, craft items — from simple tools to complex machines — and watch your island grow with every step.

Start building your dream island today! ?

title: Tank Challenge
description:
Tank Challenge is an action-packed tank battle game that tests your reflexes and strategy. Play solo or challenge a friend in fast-paced matches.

Defeat your opponent using powerful weapons like lasers, triple bullets, bomb shells, and rockets.

Make quick decisions, aim carefully, and stay ahead to win. Smooth on mobile and desktop, easy to learn but challenging to master.

Enter the arena and fight for victory!

title: Suitable Outfit Dressup
description: Suitable Outfit Dressup is a fashionable and exciting dress up game. If you are a big fan of fashion games, then you will surely enjoy this game! Try different dress styles, hairstyles to make your anime girl character stand out and show off your skills as a fashion line master in the game! Have fun playing!

title: Dusty Cat
description: Help the little speck of dust to grow into a real cat! Eat other dust, avoid larger enemies and grow to see all the phases of your Dusty Cat! Collect points and compete with other players to get your scores on the leaderboard!

title: STALKER-Strike
description: STALKER-Strike is a tactical online shooter inspired by CS and Valorant — but set in a deadly Zone filled with anomalies. Fight as stalkers or special forces in fast-paced PvP battles where hazards can shift the tide. Level up, survive traps, and prove your skills. Love CS, Standoff, or Valorant? Then step into the Zone and become a legend in this intense fusion of esports action and danger!

title: Obby Highest Jump Ever
description:
Obby Highest Jump Ever is a click-based jumping and climbing game where every click makes you stronger. Start from a small 10M building and push your way up to massive 2500M towers as your jump power grows step by step. Each new height feels like a new milestone, and every rooftop trophy proves you earned it.

Your goal is simple: jump higher, reach the top, and collect trophies. The higher the building, the bigger the reward.

title: Perfect Tidy
description: Welcome to Perfect Tidy, a simple and relaxing cleaning simulator game that you can play for free. Are you good at cleaning work? Searching for something that is stress-relieving? Join Perfect Tidy, where you can dive into multiple cleaning tasks: Car washing, skin care, teeth fixing, pet care, and more. Unlike cleaning in real life, all you have to do in the game is click, drag, and enjoy the present moment.

title: Tropical Match 2
description: Tropical Match is back with its highly anticipated second sequel! Join your island friend Coco for a colorful Match 3 adventure in a lush tropical paradise. Match juicy fruits, vibrant flowers, and clear away algae and clouds across 1,250+ exciting levels. Complete Daily Missions and discover tropical treasures along the way! With relaxing island tunes and gorgeous scenery, this is the perfect summer escape. Dive in and start your tropical adventure today!

title: Crowd Evolution!
description: you start as a single person and grow your team by running through the city and gathering people of the same color. Your goal is to build a massive army that no one can stop! Chase down and absorb smaller crowds, but be careful, as larger crowds will try to absorb you. Use strategy and quick reflexes to become the biggest crowd on the map before time runs out!

title: Red Stickman vs Monster School
description:
Red Stickman vs Monster School - stickman game where you need to pick up different weapons and clear levels from mobs from the school of monsters. The game contains

- 60 levels
- 10 bosses
- Many types of different weapons!

Did you like the game "Red Stickman vs Monster School "? - Then write a review and play all our games about stickmen.

title: Galaxy Carnage
description: Battle in space with countless enemies and their bosses coming in waves. Lots of weapons, lots of lasers, lots of explosions and effects. Upgrade the starship to the most powerful machine for exterminating alien invaders.

title: Rope Rescue! - Unique Puzzle
description: Rope Rescue is a puzzle game with simple controls but a challenging twist. Strategize to save everyone using ropes while dodging tricky traps and obstacles. Stay sharp to overcome each level and claim exciting rewards. With its easy-to-learn mechanics and increasingly complex challenges, this game will keep you hooked as you perfect your rescue skills!

title: Mahjong Triple 3D Tile Match
description: Jump into a fresh and relaxing brain challenge with Mahjong Triple 3D - Tile Match, a fun and addictive match-3 puzzle game that brings the classic mahjong experience into a colorful 3D world! In this game, the tiles are stacked in beautiful 3D shapes. Your goal is simple but satisfying: tap and collect three identical tiles to clear them from the board.

title: Grandma with machine-gun: Apocalypsis
description:
Granny is in a hurry to get home and bake some pies. But there's one problem - first she needs to bake a few hundred zombies! They'll be chasing you in cars and motorcycles, they'll have machine guns, rocket launchers, and support drones.
But you've got a pretty good arsenal too - from a revolver and machine guns to a minigun and a bazooka.
Help Granny get home, roast them all!

title: Goodeluxe
description: Goo Deluxe is a Collapse game with a sticky and satisfying aesthetic. It's a simple and relaxing game. Unlike other Goobox games, Goo Deluxe is not limited by time, allowing you all the time to think. Isn't that true luxury?

title: Car Paint
description: Carpaint is a free, family-friendly HTML5 logic puzzle game and casual brain teaser featuring 30 vibrant color grid challenges. Guide colorful cars across a 3×3 board, leaving paint trails to match reference patterns. This addictive, cross-platform online puzzle works in any browser or on mobile - play now!

title: Cunning Ginger
description: Cunning Ginger is a super fun game that'll give you lots of excitement and intense emotions! The game follows the adventures of a cute red cat, Ginger, as he goes on a great journey around the world. He's catching falling food items and dodging all sorts of dangerous things along the way. Your goal in the game is to help Ginger explore the world and pick up as many goodies as possible. But beware - there are tons of dangerous obstacles that could harm your furry friend.

title: Hidden Object Farm Adventure
description: Play a fun hidden object game with 30 farm levels! each level, find 6 hidden things before time runs out. If you need help, use a hint! It's easy to play and full of colorful farm fun.

title: Jigsolitaire
description: Step into a peaceful world of beautiful images made from gentle, carefully crafted blocks. Jigsolitaire is a game you’ll want to return to every day: it helps you unwind, disconnect from stress, and enjoy a small moment of calm just for yourself. Each level reveals a new scene - warm landscapes, charming cottages, delicate nature details, and quiet corners you’ll love exploring piece by piece.

title: Shelter Security: Gatekeeper Simulator
description: Become the gatekeeper of the most bizarre shelter in a post-apocalyptic world! In this guard simulator, you’ll face chaos, humor, and wild challenges. Inspect documents at the visa center, scan luggage for contraband, and distinguish peaceful residents from prankster mutants and disguised bandits.

title: Dynamons 12
description:
Embark on a brand new Dynamons adventure in Dynamons 12! This online monster collecting game includes two fresh areas to explore; Guardian Tomb world and the bonus cave.

Seasoned Dynamons Captain Jovani will tell you everything you need to know to become a true Dynamon trainer. Encounter the 8 titans from the Guardian King: Bearmoryx, Sharkonyx, Crocynos, Horzaryx, Visi, Rhinodys, Fenixaro, Uryndur and many more special Dynamons.

title: ColorWars.io - Conquest Game
description: Color Wars is a fast-paced strategy game where you battle three opponents to control the most territory before time runs out. Deploy powerful cards like Warrior, Ranger, Thunder, and Wizard, each with unique abilities. Earn trophies by ranking in the top two and use gold to upgrade your cards. Plan smart moves, outplay rivals, and dominate the battlefield.

title: Metal Bay Top Blade Power
description:
Metal Bay Top Blade Power is a top-down action game inspired by spinning blade battles.

Control a powerful metal top blade and fight against enemies in the Metal Bay arena, using real-time physics-based collisions and spin power mechanics.

Master speed, impact force, and rotation control to understand when to attack, collide, or evade.

title: The Roman Empire Colosseum
description: The war in the colosseum has never been as epic as in this game! Arrange your units and send them into battle! This online game is a battle simulator similar to Totally Accurate Battle Simulator. Your units include warriors, riders, titans, dwarves, mages, and more.

title: Catch The Pig
description: This is a casual elimination game. The main purpose of the game is to find three identical pigs, catch them, and collect all the pig collections!

title: Football Rush 3D
description: Football Rush 3d is a fast-paced, one-touch soccer game that puts you in the boots of a solo football hero. Forget complex controls—just tap, strike, and score! Whether you’re curving shots from midfield or charging down the pitch with speed boosts, every moment is packed with action.

title: Angry Flappy
description: "Angry Flappy is a fast-paced twist on the classic game, where players not only navigate through obstacles but also shoot bullets to destroy enemies and barriers. Get ready for an action-packed flying adventure!"

title: Space Pin Master - Pull Pin Puzzle
description: Relax and challenge your brain with Space Pin Master! Enjoy satisfying pull pin puzzles in a space adventure full of gravity-based fun. Free the balls, avoid bombs and obstacles to fill the spaceship. Spin to win coins and unlock new balls, pins, spaceships, and themes. Simple yet addictive gameplay with stunning graphics and innovative levels. Ready to become the pull pin master? Jump in and start the space puzzle adventure!

title: ThumbPinball
description: ThumbPinball is an engaging physics-based pinball game that challenges players to manipulate various mechanisms and angles to achieve their objectives. Bounce the ball strategically to hit specific targets and tackle formidable bosses across exciting levels. Ideal for quick play sessions, it offers a blend of skill, strategy, and fun for all ages.

title: Hexa Stack
description: Welcome to Hexa Stack—an all-new hexagon puzzle that’s equal parts relaxing and challenging. Sort colorful tiles by color, stack smart to create powerful combos, and think ahead before the board fills up. Each level adds new twists, requiring focus, memory, and clever planning. Stuck? Use boosters like swap and shuffle to keep your run alive. Simple controls, satisfying merges, and nonstop brain fun!

title: One Line
description: One Line is a casual art drawing game where your mission is to use a single line to protect an innocent man from a series of unfortunate events. From shielding him against heavy rain to fending off aggressive bees and even angry giants, each level presents a new challenge. Get creative and use the power of One Line to ensure he stays safe, all while enjoying the simple yet satisfying drawing mechanics. The more you play, the more you'll need to think outside the box to keep him protected!

title: Dinosaur Shifting Run
description: Get ready for a prehistoric race unlike any other! Dinosaur Shifting Run throws you into a thrilling adventure where you transform into mighty dinosaurs to overcome obstacles and outrun rivals.

title: Colors&Forms
description:
Dynamic and exciting!
Choose the game mode!
Complete missions and pass all levels!
Levels differ in color palettes and falling elements.
Interact with the objects appearing on the game screen, which complicate the process of the game.
After accumulating enough pieces, unlock the game type “Infinity”!
Choose your favorite level and accumulate as many pieces as possible to beat your opponents!

title: Max Crusher: Crazy Destruction and Car Crashes
description:
Max Crusher: Crazy Destruction and Car Crashes is an exciting game in which the player has to become a real wrecking racer.

There are many unique cars available in the game, each of which has its own characteristics and capabilities. From classic sports cars to massive monster trucks, you will have complete freedom to choose the vehicle for your crazy adventures.

title: Marathon Race io
description: In Marathon Race io, players take on the role of a runner who strives to become the fastest athlete on the planet. Players start at a basic level and can improve runner skills such as speed, endurance, income, etc. The more the player covers the distance, the more opportunities there are to improve skills and collect bonuses.

title: Sprunki 3D Shooter
description: Sprunki 3D Shooter delivers nonstop action as you face off against waves of Sprunkies! Your mission is simple: shoot to survive as long as you can. Run out of ammo? Search the battlefield for scattered rounds to keep the fight alive. Gear up and prepare to take on the Sprunkies—can you last the challenge?

title: Furry Kung Fu
description: Furry Kung-Fu & Babushka is a humorous fighting game with fun cartoon graphics, where controlling Cat or Babushka you need to inflict the enemy a series of hand-to-hand strikes, managing to dodge the sinister ball and sausage, which every second flies at you. Engage in epic hand-to-hand combat with park troublemakers. Earn achievements, get coins, unlock player skins! Will you be able to throw enemy sausage back at them? How long can you hold out? It's time to find out!

title: Pato Vs Cops
description: lay Pato Vs Cops — the ultimate free browser police chase game! No download needed — jump into nonstop car chases, dodge roadblocks, and outdrive relentless cops in fast-paced arcade action. Perfect for fans of unblocked racing games, endless car chase games, and online driving challenges. Show off your reflexes, collect power-ups, and see how long you can survive the heat in this thrilling high-speed pursuit!

title: Coffee Color Blocks
description: Coffee Color Blocks is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you move colored shapes around the board and guide them to gates of the matching color. Each correct connection fills the cups inside the shape — your goal is to fill the entire figure without blocking the path.

title: Hide Me
description: Do you love the thrill of cat and mouse games? Are you ready to outsmart your pursuers and claim victory? Dive into "Hide Me", the latest hide-and-seek adventure that will put your wits and reflexes to the test!

title: Money ping pong
description:
Money ping pong is a casual idle game where you need to deftly install money blocks, use them to reduce the space for balls and earn money faster and more money!

There are many different maps
and dozens of functional blocks
Relaxing gameplay

title: Connect 2 Cars
description: Connect 2 Cars: A Super Fun and Addictive Puzzle Game for All Ages. Connect 2 Cars is the ultimate puzzle game designed to entertain kids and adults alike! Whether you’re a puzzle enthusiast or simply looking for a relaxing and free-to-play game, Connect 2 Cars has something for everyone. Get ready to immerse yourself in hours of engaging gameplay as you challenge your brain and enjoy connecting adorable car tiles.

title: Snake Puzzle 3D
description:
Get ready to unravel a tangled knot of snakes to solve this puzzle! ?? Dive into the world of puzzle-solving games to become the legendary tangle master 3D! ??

Knock-knot! Who’s there? Riddle. Riddle who? Riddle me this: how do you unravel a twisted tangle of serpents? With your sharp puzzle-solving skills! ? Welcome to Snake Knot: Sort Puzzle Game where your logic and gaming skills will be tested! Sort serpents to unknot every twisted tangle and free every color snake!

title: Magic Bubbles
description: Quick games, satisfying pops and constant rewards — what’s not to love? Enjoy a bubble shooter built for endless play, with weekly bonuses, boosters that change the game and the Lucky Wheel for a little extra fun. There’s always something new to pop.

title: ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang
description: Step into the world of ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang, where you take on the role of an adorable mukbang streamer! Get ready to indulge in delicious food, satisfy your cravings, and share the experience with your viewers in a cozy, interactive livestream. The more you eat and engage, the more you earn!

title: Merge Master
description: A casual mobile game centered around matching and elimination. The game features vibrant colors, coupled with a visual style rich in beach elements. With background music and sound effects reminiscent of leisurely walks along the beach, it creates a relaxed beach-strolling environment that immerses players in an auditory experience.

title: Jelly Run 2048
description: Jelly Run 2048 is a challenging casual puzzle game that combines the classic 2048 number merging with exciting parkour gameplay. Guide your jelly block by swiping left or right to connect and disconnect cubes. Merge cubes to get double the number, reaching 2048 or greater. When the jelly block collides with tiles of the same number, they merge into a larger number.

title: Find Sort Match
description: Find Sort Match is a fun and creative puzzle that combines sort and match elements. Let you experience the joy of DIY! In the game, sort and match items of various shapes, colors, and types. And complete each level of the challenge.

title: 100 Doors Puzzle Box
description: The main goal in 100 Doors Puzzle Box is to escape the room. Using all the possibilities you need to open each of 100 doors and move the elevator to the next floor. Search for hidden objects, sovle puzzles and use an items to do this!

title: Dolphin Couple Underwater Dress Up
description: In Dolphin Couple Underwater Dress Up, you get to explore a vibrant underwater world where two playful dolphins are ready to get glammed up! This charming dress-up game lets you choose outfits, accessories, and fun props to create a stylish underwater look for both dolphins.

title: Fix The Hoof
description: Fix The Hoof is a soothing simulation game where you take on the role of a hoof care specialist, restoring and beautifying the hooves of animals like horses, cows, and goats. Enjoy deeply satisfying ASMR moments as you clean, polish, and paint hooves in this engaging 3D experience. Earn money from your services to upgrade your farm and expand your collection of animals to care for.

title: Code Runner: Binary Confusion
description: A fast-paced binary runner where logic and reflexes collide. Match the rule, dodge the wrong digit — survive the code! .A psychological runner puzzle where every second counts and one rule could change everything.

title: Mine FPS shooter: Noob Arena
description: Enter dynamic arenas packed with relentless enemies, each wave more challenging than the last! Equip yourself with 7 different weapons and 5 types of armor to face off against diverse foes. With unique square graphics and three arenas to conquer, gear up for the ultimate boss battle at the end!

title: Chill Girl Clicker
description: Chill Girl Clicker is a soothing, laid-back clicker game that’s perfect for unwinding and finding your zen. Just like its predecessor, Chill Girl Clicker, this game offers a serene and calming experience, but with a delightful twist: a charming girl as the main character, bringing a fresh and enchanting vibe to your screen.

title: My Cake Shop: Bake & Serve
description: Run your own sweet bakery in My Cake Shop! Bake and stack colorful donuts, clean messy floors, and serve hungry customers. Expand across the world by unlocking new bakery locations and upgrading machines. Manage crowds, grow your patisserie empire, and become the ultimate idle arcade tycoon!

title: Animal Block Pop Puzzle
description: Animal Block Pop Puzzle is a fun puzzle game with cute animal-themed visuals. ??✨ Match 3+ animal-shaped blocks ?? on a grid to clear them and score points. As you progress, the game gets faster and adds new tile colors for a growing challenge. With easy drag-and-drop controls and vibrant graphics, it offers a relaxing yet exciting experience for all ages.

title: Shelf Sweep
description:
Get ready to tidy up the shelves in Shelf Sweep!
Dive into a fun and addictive sorting puzzle game where your goal is to clean up messy shelves layer by layer. Only the outermost layer of items is visible—clear them by matching three identical items, and reveal the hidden treasures beneath!

title: Enchanted Mahjong Saga
description: Enchanted Mahjong Saga is a fast-paced twist on the classic tile-matching game, with unlimited levels to challenge your mind. Match tiles, beat the clock, and keep your streak alive as each level gets tougher and more exciting. Feeling stuck? Use helpful hints to get back on track and stay in the game.Whether youre playing for a quick break or settling in for a longer session, theres always a new puzzle waiting.

title: Cube Stack 2048
description:
Cube Stack 2048 is a highly addictive casual game inspired by the classic puzzle game 2048, but with exciting new gameplay!
Merge numbered cubes to double their value, reach 2048, or even higher! Try to make it to the end.
Explore tons of amazing and challenging levels by merging cubes, avoiding obstacles, and collecting money!

title: Gravity Speed Run
description: Gravity Speed Run is a game where you run along walls instead of on the ground. You will climb vertical surfaces, avoiding obstacles and head-on collisions. As you advance, try to complete the challenging levels, this game will test how fast you react.

title: Dragon Hunter
description:
Choose your character, roll the dice and go on a fun adventure.
Click on monsters - help the hero survive and defeat the legendary dragons in the clicker RPG Dragon Hunter.
Luck and a strong phone glass will determine the fate of the dragon hunter.

title: Unblock Ball Slide Puzzle
description:
Welcome to Unblock Ball: Slide Puzzle, a classic sliding puzzle game that lets you use your mind.You can feel a sense of accomplishment! Sliding the board to create the channel for the ball to roll smoothly to the end. You should use your logical mind to cleverly move blocks, avoid
obstacles, and solve every puzzle!

title: Noob Legends Dungeon Adventures
description: Dive into a thrilling 2D action-platformer! Battle zombies, drones, upgrade weapons, rescue friends, & uncover hidden secrets!

title: Screw Puzzle
description:
Enter the world of Screw Puzzle, a captivating and intricate pin puzzle game where your strategic thinking and creativity are put to the test.

The mission is straightforward - unlock holes to make these bars fall in the correct sequence. Sounds simple, yet with unlimited levels of varying complexity, it promises an intriguing brain-teasing journey.

title: Robot Terminator T Rex
description: Ready for an adventure in Robot Terminator T-Rex! Enter the wonderful world where robot dinosaurs and zombies collide in a nervous battle. You'll control a terrifying robotic T-Rex, equipped with powerful weapons and amazing abilities.

title: Dynamons Connect
description:
Dive into the exciting world of Dynamons Connect! This fun and engaging game with adorable, colorful characters helps improve focus and visual perception.
Match identical tiles by connecting them with a path that has no more than two turns to clear the board. With endless levels, the challenge never stops!

title: World Z Defense - Zombie Defense
description: Zombies have taken over the world! Unlock bases and deploy soldiers with unique weapons, each with stats like damage, fire rate, and reload speed. Soldiers must reload at the base before defending. Place them wisely to stop zombies within range. Defeat waves to earn coins, upgrade bases, and survive stronger hordes. Strategically choose soldiers to clear waves and save cities across the globe.

title: Finger Soccer Tournament
description: Select your team and score more goals than your opponent to become the champion! Choose between single-player tournament mode (against AI) or challenge a friend in 2-player mode. Multiplayer mode is available only on mobile devices.

title: Battle of Pirate Caribbean Battle
description: Battle of Pirate: Caribbean Battle is an action-packed war game where you command a mighty pirate ship and engage in thrilling naval battles! Prepare for an epic battle war game as you sail through the Caribbean seas, fighting rival pirates, enemy warships, and legendary sea monsters. Use powerful cannons, guns, and strategic combat to conquer the ocean and become the ultimate pirate captain!

title: Draw Bridge Puzzle
description: Draw Bridge Puzzle is a creative and exciting puzzle game that combines drawing and rescue gameplay into one addictive experience. You become a bridge designer, using your finger to draw safe paths and complete thrilling rescue missions. Enter the car mode, draw a strong bridge to help a motor cross gaps, broken roads, and dangerous obstacles to reach the goal.

title: MineBlocks 3D Maze
description: MineBlocks 3D Maze: A Mind-Bending Adventure in a Blocky World! Get ready to step into a world of puzzles and creativity with MineBlocks 3D Maze—an incredible game that’s perfect for kids and adults alike. If you’re a fan of brain-teasers and enjoy a good challenge, this 3D puzzle game is exactly what you need. It’s all about strategy, logic, and a little bit of muscle (virtual, of course)!  Push the blocks strategically to guide them onto the altars scattered across the level.

title: Doge Bubble
description: Doge Bubble is a classic bubble shooter game with multiple challenging levels. Doge Bubbles features the classic bubble shooter gameplay with 3 powerups: The rocket that clears the chosen path, the bomb that clears up to 8 bubbles at a time and the multi color bubble. The goal in each level is to "free" all the doge bubbles.

title: JUMPER
description:
Bounce your way to record-breaking heights in JUMPER! Dodge epic traps, collect unique power-ups, and enjoy upgraded visuals as you climb higher and higher.

Unlock adorable skins and earn achievements as you master your jumps. Whether you're aiming for the top or just chilling, JUMPER offers a relaxing platform-hopping experience packed with charm.

title: Merge Squares
description: "Merge Squares" is an exciting puzzle game, where your task is to connect squares with same numbers. Using logic and strategic mind, you have to decide how to arrange the squares to combine them into one. Each level gets harder, how far can you go?

title: Flip Knife
description: Explore different rooms, jump on all sorts of objects: shelves, tables, chairs, sofas, and even subwoofers!Make the knife jump or even double flip. How? Just tap the screen at the right moment and jump!

title: Super Tank Hero
description: Super Tank Hero is an action shooting game. You can drive a tank to shoot and fight on the battlefield, usually facing seven enemies and obstacles. You need to collect soldiers before the battle, they'll join your team and help you fight. You can also find energy and Life on the battlefield to increase your speed or power. When you are able to fight, follow the instructions to find your opponent and fire at him until you beat him.

title: City Banana Man Agent
description: Begin an interesting fighting experience in City Banana Man Agent! You'll play as a strange banana agent passing busy city streets. Choose a spot to land and start exploring this wonderful city.Find the target and complete the task. And show your driving skills. Equipped with many powerful weapons and shoot enemies. Aim your gun at the enemy and attack him.

title: Cool Man
description: Hi there! It sounds like you're interested in playing Cool Man Adventure, To play, you'll need to jump & run on platforms, avoid obstacles and fire gas , robo, gear ring , and defeat enemies. Don't forget to collect key along the way! The game has 10 levels for you to explore, so there's plenty of adventure to be had.

title: Zombie Chase
description: In Zombie Chase, players navigate a chaotic world filled with the undead, using every ounce of strategic prowess to outlast the apocalypse. This is not a typical racing game, youll need to manage resources and make smart decisions to survive the relentless zombie hordes. Your brain isnt just a desirable snack for zombies in this game - its your greatest weapon!

title: World Solitaire -Tripeaks-
description:
It is TriPeaks, one of the most famous solitaires in the world.
Take a step to go up and test your brain and luck
How far can I clean it?

title: Kings and Queens Match 2
description: Kings and Queens Match 2 is one of the most anticipated Match 3 sequels! This long-awaited second chapter features 2,500+ incredible levels full of magic and adventure. Join Princess Bella on a magical adventure, matching jewels and crowns to uncover hidden treasures. Create powerful boosters like Royal Bombs, hammers, and arrows to clear obstacles and win big. Stunning graphics and an enchanting soundtrack bring the kingdom to life. Get ready for a royal journey full of fun and surprises!

title: Jelly Block Puzzle
description: Dive into the fun with our vibrant jelly merging game! Explore a world filled with countless levels, merge jellies, use power-ups, and stay entertained. Challenge your brain and see how far you can go in this delightful, jelly-colored adventure!

title: Thread Sort
description: Thread Sort is a relaxing and satisfying puzzle game where you organize colorful threads on spools and turn them into beautiful cross-stitched pictures. Sort mixed threads by color, clear the pegs, and watch as neatly arranged strands automatically stitch a charming image on the canvas. With cozy visuals, smooth animations, and simple controls, Thread Sort is perfect for fans of sorting puzzles, knitting games, and calming casual challenges.

title: Bus Driver Simulator 3D
description:
Bus Driver Simulator 3D is a bus simulator in which you will be able to drive different types of buses traveling around different parts of the world including Los Angeles, Berlin, Rome, Alaska and so on.

Each scenario in Bus Driver Simulator 3D has special characteristics. So, for example, in Alaska you will be driving on snowy tundra, and other cars will not be very much, but on the city highway in Los Angeles the traffic will be more intense.

title: Merge Home Mania
description: Welcome to an exciting game where creativity meets strategy! Merge items, build unique structures and decorate your perfect home. Use materials like stone, wood, textiles, flowers and plants to create furniture and decorations. Design beautiful rooms and show off your decorating talent!

title: FaceChart
description: Do you dream of creating wild, fabulous looks like your favorite artists on social media? Dive into the enchanting realm of Face Chart! Wondering what a face chart is? It's your chic canvas to plan the next jaw-dropping, glamorous look. Grab a piece of paper and let it be your pocket-sized playground—experiment with new colors you hesitated to wear, pick and mix diverse designs for an endless array of possibilities.

title: Merry Christmas Stickman
description: Help Stickman escape from jail just in time for the holidays! This time, he’s on his own, relying solely on a mysterious Christmas package filled with special items. Choose carefully to aid his breakout in this festive, story-driven adventure packed with seasonal surprises—can Stickman make it to freedom before the New Year?

title: Agent Squad
description:
Looking for an engaging casual shooter that’s easy to get the hang of but offers engrossing action and real tactical challenges? 
Agent Squad is a top-down shooting game with intelligent mechanics, loads of cool upgradable guns, and addictive gameplay

title: Ball Eating Simulator
description: Get ready to have a great eating and growing fun under an open sky with cool balls inside different costumes in this great simulator game! Eat as much as balls around and get as much as big in the ball’s arena. Eat others, earn coins, and unlock new skins. Chase after gifts, rotate the lucky spin, or enjoy the everyday gifts to carry your eating simulator experience further. All you want is to become the king of the ball arena with your cool player.

title: Dinosaur Cards
description: Explore, match, conquer! Dino challenge! Win by matching sets of dinosaurs faster than time runs out. Dive into dino fun today!

title: Muscle Up Master
description: The aim of this game that will help you become a muscle master, a boxer or an MMA fighter is to reach the best level! In this adventure where you start with a weak body, start exercising and reach a more muscular body by merging with the characters. As you progress, participate in fighting tournaments and grow faster with the rewards you earn!

title: Cooking Empire
description: Cooking Empire is not just a cooking game, it’s a real explosion of flavors and speed! Start frying, boiling, baking and serving dishes from all over the world with one click! Are you ready to become a chef the whole world will remember?

title: Bubble Around
description: Bubble Around is bubble shooter with a twist. You shoot the bubbles from the inside to the playing field around you. Match 3 or more bubbles to make them pop. Clear all bubbles to complete the level. Each level will be slightly more challenging. Stuck in a level? Use the bomb, rocket or multi color power up. Find out all level shapes!

title: Carnage Battle Arena
description:
Get Carnage now and discover a new kind of racing game! Driving fast and getting to the finish line is only one of the multiple challenges that await you. Wreak havoc on the streets thanks to the extensive destruction model that lets you not only damage vehicles, but also cause visible changes in the environment. After a long battle, the location will look nothing like it used to at the start!

Whichever mode you choose, get ready for loads of adrenaline-pumping action! Play Carnage now!

title: Last Ufo Defense
description:
Last UFO DefenseThe galaxy is no safe place. 
As the last UFO of your kind, you stand alone against endless waves of hostile alien forces determined to wipe you out.
Pilot your hovering warship and unleash its full potential:One UFO, endless enemies. 
Survive as long as you can with precise upgrades and tactical choices.
Face relentless alien swarms in an endless survival challenge.You are the final line of defense in a hostile galaxy.
How long can the last UFO endure?

title: Paint Master
description: Fill the squares to match the sample pattern. Tap the brush to paint a straight line of squares in one move. When your moves reach zero the game is over, so use them carefully to clear the stage!

title: Stickman Guys Defense
description:
Stickman Guys Defense is an action-packed tower defense game where you must protect your base from endless waves of enemies! Command a team of brave stickman warriors, place them strategically, and upgrade their abilities to stop the invasion. From archers to sword fighters, build the ultimate defense and survive each level!

Can you defend your land and become the ultimate Stickman commander?

title: Knock and Run. 100 Doors Escape
description: Become the fastest and most daring stickman in this fun arcade game! Your goal is to race through the corridors of the hotel, ring the doors, knock and slam them, arranging epic pranks. The main thing is not to get caught! Residents' reactions are unpredictable, and danger can lurk around every corner.

title: Flower Sort
description:
Sort Flowers is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you sort flowers by type!
Combine three identical flowers in one pot to grow a lush, beautiful bush.
Plan your moves, create satisfying merge chains, and enjoy the colorful and cozy atmosphere.
Each level brings new combinations, vibrant colors, and delightful visual effects.

title: Break Beat
description: Break Beat is a fast-paced and colorful brick-breaker game with a pixel art/neon aesthetic and an electronic music soundtrack.

title: Grenade Simulator
description: Begin the most explosive simulator experience ever. Grenade Simulator is an adrenaline-pumping explosion simulator where you can freely throw grenades, drop mines, and trigger massive blasts. This isn’t just a casual game.

title: ChessField
description: Enter ChessField, a strategic battle chess game where classic moves meet action-packed arenas! Plan, fight, and outsmart rivals in epic chess battles across dynamic fields. Perfect for students searching cool math games, chess online challenges, or fun school break strategy. With addictive gameplay, smart tactics, and arcade-style twists, ChessField is the ultimate free kids game for fans of chess, battle chess, and strategy games.

title: MeatRider
description: Welcome to "MeatRider" — an intense action-packed game set in a post-apocalyptic world overrun by zombies. You find yourself right in the middle of the chaos, where your only goal is to survive at all costs. Choose one of the unique combat vehicles, each with its own special abilities and weapons, and get ready for dynamic battles across a zombie-infested desert landscape.

title: Unblock It 3D
description:
Power up your logic and spatial reasoning skills with Unblock It 3D! Rotate the cluster of bricks to find unblocked tiles you can slide away without hitting any obstructions. 

Play Classic Mode and enjoy hundreds of intricate puzzles with unlimited moves, new cube designs and backgrounds to unlock.

Or, journey through time in Adventure Mode. Try your hand at 25 additional levels of increasing complexity and size. Explore Ancient Egypt, Medieval Europe, the Aztec Empire, feudal Japan, and more.

title: Snake Hunter
description:
"Snake Hunter" – Giant serpents are invading our homeland! Grab your weapons, fortify our defenses, and slay the monstrous snakes to protect our land.

In this game, you play as a guardian, battling each segment of the serpent's massive body. Collect skills and upgrade buffs dropped by the snakes to enhance your weapon's power and abilities. As you face different serpents across various levels, you'll need to strategically choose skills to counter their attacks and emerge victorious.

title: Mighty Run
description: Mighty Run is an action-packed platformer where you jump, dodge obstacles, and defeat enemies to progress. Collect gifts along the way and reach the end to grab the diamond, unlocking the next level. Use power-ups, master tricky jumps, and overcome challenges in this thrilling adventure. With smooth controls and exciting gameplay, every level is a test of skill. Can you collect all the rewards and reach the finish line? Play Mighty Run now and prove your skills!

title: Slinger Block
description: Guide a red square through compact grid-based puzzles filled with sliding blocks and locked paths. Clear the way, collect every yellow key, unlock the yellow door, and reach the exit to win. Simple rules, clever layouts, and satisfying logic challenges make each level a fun brain teaser.

title: Math Duck
description:
You play as a fearless duck who battles enemies not with brute force, but with math smarts.

The rules are simple but addictive:
- Pick from shuffled number cards and combine them to make 10.
- Each correct match becomes your attack to damage enemies.
- Defeat foes, earn XP, and level up your duck!

Every level-up lets you choose from 3 unique upgrades. Each run is different, and your choices shape the way your duck fights.

Sharpen your mind, master the numbers, and guide your duck to victory!

title: Glitch
description:
Glitch is a 2D platformer game where you must solve challenging puzzles to overcome the glitching platform and reach the finish door. Get ready for a gaming experience like no other, whether you’re a fan of puzzles, action, or platformers. Start your adventure!

Innovative Puzzle Mechanics: Tackle a range of puzzles designed to test your problem-solving abilities. Each level offers a unique brain teaser, from classic logic challenges to cutting-edge new mechanics.

title: I Am Security
description: Have you ever wanted to be a hardened security officer and be on the front lines of maintaining order? In I Am Security, an ultra-realistic role-playing simulator, you play the role of a professional security guard. You decide whether or not to allow them to enter. Some guests may try to sneak in with prohibited items and find these hidden items. Performs tasks in a variety of scenarios to identify suspicious persons.

title: Woody Tap Block
description:
Woody Tap Block is an addictive puzzle game where you have to use logical thinking to move and remove wooden blocks in the right direction. With simple yet challenging mechanics, the game offers a relaxing yet engaging experience.
Plan your moves in the correct order to clear all the blocks.
As you progress through levels, the puzzles become more challenging with new obstacles and block types to overcome.

title: Hair Stack 3D
description: Hair Stack 3D is a hair running game. Go through the numbered doors and collect more hair. Dodge the obstacles that make you less in number. Your ultimate goal is to make more hair so that the bald head at the end can have beautiful hair! Are you ready to help him? Let him applaud you!

title: Truck Simulator Arcade Championship
description: Truck Simulator Arcade Championship is an exhilarating truck racing game that combines the intensity of high-speed competition with the precision of driving massive, powerful trucks. This game offers an action-packed arcade-style experience where players take control of different types of trucks and compete in various challenging racing events across diverse tracks and terrains.

title: Bubble Shooter Remastered
description: Shoot groups of bubbles and form groups to make them pop. Form groups of 3 or more bubbles of the same color to make the bubbles explode.

title: Idle Supermarket Tycoon
description: Build and manage your dream shopping mall! Expand by adding new shops, upgrade interiors, serve customers, and boost your reputation. Invest wisely, assign priority shoppers, and earn extra income with delivery vehicles. Complete missions to unlock rewards!

title: Coe Snake
description: Coe Snake brings the classic snake game with new challenges! Collect fruits, dodge meteors, walls, bombs, and balls that move like ping pong. Multiple modes, scenarios, and fruits to choose from. Fast-paced, colorful, and addictive — how far can you go?

title: HomeRun Derby
description: Step up to the plate and experience the excitement of Baseball's exhilarating Home Run Derby! Swing your bat and aim for the fences to hit as many home runs as you can. Time your swings carefully to score big points and keep the crowd cheering! How many home runs can you hit in a row? Test your skills and see if you can become the ultimate Home Run champion!

title: We Will Not Survive
description: Survive the apocalypse in We Will Not Survive, an idle tower defense game! Upgrade weapons, harvest resources, and fight relentless zombie waves to protect your base. Are you ready to defend and thrive?

title: Meow Block: Color Collect!
description: A burst of color, clever thinking, and adorable cats await you in Meow Block: Color Collect! This charming puzzle experience turns simple movements into brain-teasing fun, where every swipe matters and every match brings you closer to victory.

title: Children's doctor: treating ears
description: Ready to become the best pediatric doctor in the world? Learn to use medical instruments, give first aid to patients? Play our doctor without downloads, registration and absolutely free!

title: Wood Color Block
description: Step into the colorful puzzle world of Wood Color Block, where strategy and quick thinking collide. Slide vibrant blocks into place, match them with their crushers, and clear the board before time runs out. With each level, the puzzles grow more challenging, pushing your skills to the limit.

title: Jet Fighter Airplane Racing
description:
Are you a fan of car traffic games & street racing? Do you like planes and the sky? We have something new to play! Try a plane flying game with different missions, improve your flying skills and become a true professional in racing piloting in Jet Fighter Airplane Racing!

Are you looking for exclusive aeroplanes?
• MiG-21 “Fishbed"
• McDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom II
• MiG-29 “Fulcrum”
• F-16 Fighting Falcon
• MiG-31 BM “Foxhound”
• F-22 Raptor
• SU-35 “Flanker-E”
• SU-47 "Firkin"
• SU-57

title: Match Master
description:
Match them all!
Match all same pairs in the given time to win the game and earn coins. Use various powerups to match them faster. Spen your coins to decorate your house and unlock new houses.

title: Cargo Skates
description:
No obstacles, no matter how high, can stop me from collecting more goods.
Pass the obstacles and finally collect enough goods.
Now, your supermarket can open

title: Falling Blocks Puzzle
description: Falling Blocks Puzzle is a timeless puzzle game where players arrange falling geometric shapes, to form complete horizontal lines. As lines are completed, they disappear, and players earn points. The game ends when the stack of shapes reaches the top of the screen. It’s a test of strategy and quick thinking, beloved by gamers worldwide.

title: Super Racing
description: Compete to earn the most points across four connected courses with your favorite characters. The whole world is your racetrack in the Super Racing World game. Race from one course to another through interconnected paths that span the world. Traverse mountains, forests, cities, and more—with shifting weather patterns and a day/night cycle. Everything is connected! Collect coins and unlock new cars and characters.

title: Water Junk Warriors
description: Water Junk Warriors is a vibrant eco-adventure game where players dive into polluted waterways to clean up human-made junk and restore the natural balance of riverbanks, beaches, and urban canals. Armed with clever tools and a passion for nature, players collect floating trash, unlock animated milestones, and witness the environment come back to life, one subgoal at a time.

title: Spider-Noob obstacle course
description:
Noob was bitten by a creeper-spider and became a spider-noob! Help Noob train in the big city, fly on webs, collect badges, unlock new costumes, and complete challenges. Unlock new levels. 

Complete all the levels and turn Noob into a Pro-spider

title: Big Bad Ape
description: In Big Bad Ape, you will play as an unstoppable giant ape. Join this casual battle and experience the exhilaration of destroying a city! Freed from a lab experiment, this furious monster is now unleashed. As this super monster, your job is to destroy everything.

title: Canasta Royale Offline
description:
Canasta is the most traditional and loved card game by all. It is an exciting mix of strategy, luck and skill.Canasta uses two complete decks of 52 playing cards (French Deck) plus the four Jokers. All the Jokers and twos are wild cards.

Game Features:
★ 2 or 4 players
★ Clockwise or Counter-Clockwise
★ Game is automatically saved each turn, so you can close it and continue playing later
★ Undo function so you can cancel mistaken melds

title: Eastern Star vs City Style Icon
description: Welcome to the world of style, where the ancient palaces of the East meet the splendor of a modern metropolis! Two beautiful heroines are waiting for you in the game: an oriental beauty with exquisite outfits in the style of an Ottoman fairy tale and a stylish urban fashionista conquering the catwalks of the metropolis. Dice Merge Challenges offers intuitive gameplay that's easy to pick up.
But as you progress, the challenges become more mind-bending!
Combine dice with identical numbers to trigger an explosion creating a new dice with a higher value.
Strategically merge your dice to overpower obstacles and shatter every box! Are you ready to become the ultimate Dice Merge Champion?

title: Rich Choice Run
description: Rich Choice Run is a fun swipe runner where every decision shapes your final lifestyle. Slide left and right to pick the best “boyfriend” choices and grab expensive items along the way. Your choices build your value and status—choose wisely, because one bad pick can ruin your chance.

title: Golf Orbit
description:
One shot golf simulator is the battle of golf rivals to become the golf king worldwide. Become part of this idle golf orbit rocket league in which balls go high to Mars. Smash the ball to mars and become the golf champions.

Oneshot Golf Orbit is golf offline game which has many golf rocket leagues and one shot golf battles. Be part Mars golf games to become champions of golfing over it.

title: Office Brawl - Room Smash
description:
Become the hero of an office rebellion and destroy everything in your path! The player will have to transform into a disgruntled employee who challenges the system, destroys obstacles and fights the boss.

Use brute force and ingenuity to get through difficult tests, participate in intense battles and explosive actions.
Become an antihero and sow chaos from start to finish!

title: Hidden Object Great Journey
description: “Hidden Object: Great Journey” is an engaging game that invites players to scour various themed levels for cleverly concealed items. With multiple modes, a lot of challenges, and a treasure trove of objects to find, this game promises endless fun for hidden object enthusiasts. Sharpen your observation skills and embark on a delightful search with every play!

title: Football Stars Championship
description: Try a fresh take on a football game! The luck-based gameplay will keep you on your toes. Score extra points with precise shots that avoid the goalkeeper perfectly.

title: Stickman vs Zombies WorldCraft
description:
Stickman vs Zombies WorldCraft is an action and adventure platform game in which you can play as a brave stick ninja. As your stickman hero, your mission is to wipe all the craft zombies. Along the way, you'll find money that you may use to unlock cool new skins.

Navigate the map in search of zombies before they track you down and rush you or open fire on you. Keep going, for the zombie craft will attempt to catch you if you leave even one alive.

title: Onet Mahjong Connect
description: Onet Mahjong Connect is an easy and fun puzzle game where players match identical tiles. The goal is to connect two matching tiles. Tiles can be linked if they can be joined using three or fewer straight lines. With many levels to enjoy, the game offers a relaxing and engaging experience — perfect for taking a break and sharpening your mind!

title: Italian Brainrot Bomb - 2Player
description: The dynamite bomb is left in the space hangar. Whoever has it when the time runs out wins the game, because the bomb will explode. Take the bomb from your opponent before the time runs out. When the time ends, the player holding the bomb wins. Grab the bomb to win the game. Be very careful — take the bomb and run, and never let the other player have it.

title: Real Street Fighter 3D
description: Real Street Fighter 3D have very addictive game-play and many missions. In this you have to fight with other enemies and have to complete mission. It has many addictive missions.

title: Escape & Steal Brainrot: Sahur Hills
description:
Escape & Steal Brainrot: Sahur Hills is a tense survival horror where you roam a fog-covered forest to steal brainrot pages while being hunted by the relentless Sahur entity.
No weapons, no escape-only rising whispers, shifting woods, and the race to survive before the echoes of “TUNG TUNG TUNG SAHUR” close in.

title: CS: Command Snipers
description: "CS: Command Snipers" is an exciting online game where players take on the role of elite snipers who carry out challenging missions in various combat environments. The game combines elements of tactics, precision and teamwork, providing a unique experience for fans of shooters and strategies.

title: Zoo Anomaly Simulation
description: Experience a zoo mutation crisis like no other. In Zoo Anomaly Simulation, a peaceful zoo has turned into a nightmare filled with mutated animals, and you’re the only one who can stop the chaos! Enter a first-person shooting experience like no other. Explore the eerie zoo environment, grab your weapons, and fight back against giraffes, zebras, elephants, etc.

title: Summer Maze
description: Summer Maze is a fun summer puzzle game filled with sunshine and bright colors. Guide the ball through the intricate mazes, filling all the space inside. Earn gems, unlock new skins and enjoy simple but addictive gameplay. Perfect for lovers of logic games, arcades and puzzles.

title: Screamals
description:
Change the shape of the characters with simple up-and-down manipulations
Even if obstacles get in the way, they can change their shape and pass through.
Break through the obstacle, collect the notes and fire them at the boss!

title: Pet Doctor Business Tycoon-Pet care game
description: Step into the world of animal care with Pet Doctor – Animal Hospital Simulator! Become a kind and skilled veterinarian as you treat adorable pets including cats, dogs, rabbits, and more. Use realistic medical tools to diagnose, clean wounds, check heartbeats, and perform surgeries. Each level brings new challenges where you must care for sick, injured, or pregnant animals in a friendly hospital environment.

title: Sticker Jam Peel Off & Match
description: Play Sticker Jam, the ultimate matching puzzle game! Peel vibrant stickers, match colors, and solve fun challenges. Relax and unwind with this unique blend of calming gameplay and brain-teasing puzzles. Perfect for hours of entertainment—start playing now!

title: PacXon New Realms
description:
Lay hold of the land in PacXon New Realms, the long-awaited sequel to the 2007 
classic PacXon Deluxe. Explore 192 challenging levels across 4 different locations. 
Dodge enemies as you seize chunks of territory in this thrilling twist on the original 
arcade adventure.

Enjoy a revamped user interface, a fresh soundtrack, and nostalgic pixel art 
animations. Plus, unlock 4 - 6 unique character skins per location. Get ready for a 
captivating journey filled with new features and fun.

title: Block Blast Jewel Puzzle
description: Block Blast: Jewel Puzzle is a vibrant block-stacking game that mixes calm strategy with thrilling speed. Fit jewel blocks to clear lines in Classic, Timer, or Level modes. Easy to start, tough to master, and super satisfying—compete worldwide and climb the leaderboard!

title: Ultimate Destruction Simulator
description: Unleash your destructive side in this ultimate demolition experience! Enjoy realistic tower destruction with dynamic physics, and take control of time—slow it down, speed it up, or freeze the action. Experiment with gravity modes, from low to high or even zero gravity, and customize every detail, including debris levels, destructibility, and atmospheric dust. Built for fans of destruction, this game offers the smash-and-crash fun you've been craving!

title: Mahjong Connect Majong Class
description: Mahjong Connect is a classic elimination-style casual game where players need to find and connect identical mahjong tiles on the board. The game rules are simple yet challenging, suitable for players of all ages.

title: Shop Sorting 2
description:
Love organizing and keeping things tidy? Then Shop Sorting 2 is the perfect game for you! Step into a satisfying sorting puzzle where you arrange and categorize products in a well-stocked store.
In Shop Sorting 2, the challenge shifts from organizing specialty goods to managing the variety and chaos of a busy supermarket. Test your skills as you handle groceries, household items, and more. Enjoy rewarding match and sort gameplay, unlock new products, and upgrade your store layout.

title: Bridge Fight!
description:
Stack Strategic bridges for your monster army to cross and defeat the monster enemies. Construct bridges wide enough to guide your army of monster characters to cross safely and face off against formidable foes. 
With simple yet addictive gameplay, immerse yourself in a world of tactical challenges where every move counts. 
Can you lead your army to victory and claim dominance over your enemies? 

Play Bridge Fight! now and let the fun begin!

title: Hungry Noob: Cafe Simulator
description:
Get ready for an exciting adventure with Noob and his chef friend, who have decided to turn an abandoned building into a top cafe!
Whether they succeed or not depends only on you!
Launch and play Hungry Noob: Cafe Simulator!

title: Stickman Halloween Survive
description:
Now that Halloween is here, the gloomiest day of the year, it's time to bring back the courageous white stickman who is an expert at vanquishing monsters. Stop procrastinating and start enjoying Stickman Halloween Survive right now on your preferred mobile device. It's a fun and free online game. 
Every living thing on Earth is frightened to death when monsters emerge from their underground lairs on Halloween night.

title: Cannons Blast 3D
description: Cannons Blast 3D plays like another tower defense puzzle game. With a heavy machine gun and a cannon, you need to eliminate all incoming enemy units before they get close to your castle. Your weapon has limited ammo and reloading speed. It is necessary to make a choice of fire coverage. When you earn enough gems, you can buy the other 2 weapons and upgrade your current ones. It is time to test your shooting skills!

title: Obby Prison: Craft Escape
description: The game that will test your survival instincts and creativity. Will you be able to escape from prison? Survive and escape!

title: Elevator Fight
description: Make your way to the top floor, one fight at a time. Every level, a new challenger steps in, but only one can ride up! With simple controls and over 130 levels, this game offers quick, close-quarters combat in a cramped elevator.
