Upgrade your fighter’s speed, power, and defense to keep up with the ever-changing, humorous opponents. What’s waiting at the top?

title: Uphill Rush 13
description: Introducing the new, thirteenth game in the Uphill Rush series, and this time in a new setting - a Water Park! Dive into (pun intended) the atmosphere of water fun, riding different types of tubes, surfboards and even jet skis! Unlock new power-ups and skins by overcoming obstacles, such as loops and long jumps. But don't be scared of them, they are your best friends when it comes to stunts, which give you bonuses! Not to mention, make you look insanely cool.

title: Hidden Pairs Mahjong
description: Match and clear all the tile in this Hidden Pairs Mahjong solitaire game. Use your observation skills to find and select identical open tiles to remove them from the board. With beautifully designed classic Mahjong symbols, smooth animations, and a calming background, each level offers a fresh puzzle challenge.Earn bonus time, increase your score, and progress through endless levels of tile-matching fun!

title: Fish Shooting Fish Hunter
description: Want to begin a fun and relaxing fishing adventure? In Fish Shooting - Fish Hunter, you’ll become a fishing master. Use your skills and quick reflexes to catch various fish while enjoying a laid-back casual experience!

title: Fast Lap
description: Experience the thrill of high-speed racing with a simple yet challenging touch-controlled game. Navigate a twisting track as you balance speed and control. Accelerate on straightaways, but be careful! Take curves too fast and you'll spin out. Master the art of timing to become the ultimate racer.

title: Egg Adventure 2
description: Mr Egg comes back, and also a challenge of intelligence and imagination.In egg adventure 2,you need to operate the Eggs to solve various puzzles and get out of the door.Imaginative levels ann funny painting style will take you into a whole ner puzzle world!The key to solving the puzzle may be a word or an action, that can you give it a try？

title: Special Holiday Solitaire
description:
Step into a festive world of fun with Special Holiday Solitaire! This cheerful card game combines classic solitaire gameplay with a holiday twist, creating the perfect escape for players of all ages.  
Whether you're looking for a relaxing break or a way to get into the holiday spirit, *Special Holiday Solitaire* is the perfect companion for the season. Challenge yourself, enjoy the magic of the holidays, and spread the festive cheer!

title: Cross Connect Word
description:
Fun and relaxing crossword puzzle!

Cross Word Connect is a fun but challenging word game.
Enjoy modern word game with the combine of word search and crossword! In this fantastic crossword puzzle, you will improve your vocabulary and spelling skills.

title: Bubble Shooter GO
description:
Pop. Match. Dominate.
Step into the world of precision and strategy with the ultimate bubble shooter experience.

Solo Mode – Play at your own pace or push your skills to the limit. Chain powerful combos, unlock boosters, and master every level as you progress through increasingly challenging stages.

1v1 Battles – Challenge a friend or face off against opponents. Use smart angles, fast reflexes, and well-timed power-ups to outplay your rival in intense bubble duels.

title: Harbor Operator
description:
As the harbor master and operator, navigate incoming ships to the correct docks. Tap and drag to draw routes into the docks, while taking into account the unloading time, speed, and other visual indicators.

Control beautiful ships such as yachts, super yachts, container ships, oil tankers and more. Plan your routes to avoid any shipping accidents.

title: Mahjong Connect Gold
description: Mahjong Connect Gold is an exciting puzzle game with captivating gameplay that is known to all fans of the Mahjong series. Collect all the tiles by matching their pairs according to the rules of classic Mahjong. Immerse yourself in Mahjong's unique world and dive into this captivating puzzle's depths!

title: Wacky Strike
description:
This time you will choose who are you actually. Well, no. Who is the strongest! Girls, or boys! So, just build a lot of towers, and buy your cool enemy! Fight like the real hero and you will cope with it, just try it!

Are you a good fighter? Then this game is for you! Just pick a side, setup your troops, and fight against your mortal enemy, do you think that it is so easy?! Then march from your castle to the enemy castle claiming ground in between.

title: Zombies and Guns
description:
Urgently save: the evil spirits are coming!
You are a Fighter, who is attacked by hordes of zombies and all sorts of evil spirits! Don't let them eat you alive!

title: Nine Cards Of Winter
description:
Get into the holiday spirit with Nine Cards of Winter, a fun and relaxing tile-matching game!
Pick up to 9 Christmas tiles and match 3 of the same to clear them. Watch out — if your stack fills up, the game is over!
Use smart moves to uncover hidden tiles, solve tricky puzzles, and enjoy cute holiday designs.It’s easy to play, relaxing to enjoy, and full of winter charm!

title: Bears vs. Art
description:
Bears vs. Art is the premium version of the slash em’ up puzzle game you love! Exclusive to this version of Bears vs. Art - enjoy uninterrupted, thought-provoking puzzles.
Each painting is protected by sneaky security measures including lasers, spikes and mind-bending portals. Not to mention snooty guests, nosy security guards and art-snatching thieves!

title: Elementz
description: ElementZ is a Match-3 game similar to Bejeweled or Candy Crush. Its particularity lies in giving each color its elemental power, allowing you to trigger different powers of fire (red), water (blue), earth (brown), plants (green), and electricity (yellow).

title: Emoji Match
description: the emoji match includes dozens of different emojis. you can increase or decrease the number of pieces of these puzzles as you wish. so you can make it suitable for all ages. you can have a pleasant time by having fun and exercising your brain. come on we are waiting for you.

title: Hangman Saga
description: Challenge your vocabulary with Hangman Saga! With thousands of levels, each word includes a category hint to guide you—like "Profession" for "Doctor." Guess the letters wisely, but too many mistakes end the game! Need help? Use the hint button for a clue. Perfect for all ages, this fun and educational word puzzle will keep you entertained while sharpening your spelling skills. Can you solve them all?

title: Real Motorbike Super Hero Stunt 3D
description: In this bike racing game performs insane stunts to impress. In bike stunts game you can show different type of stunts like jumping in the air and drifting as stunts man. Ride your bike in motorbike simulator 3d city environment while doing a stunt as a great biker for bike lovers.

title: Extreme Real Car Driving 2025
description: This ultimate car racing 3D lets you experience real car driving simulator like highway racing with its realistic car damage, accurate car driving physics and many other features. Car driver may use steering wheel, accelerator meter or buttons to control the car. Enjoy the best car driving simulator game and drag racing game that has an addictive game play with endless fun. Now you can modify your any sports race cars from garage according to your interest.

title: Merge Heroes
description:
In this game, you will command squads of melee fighters and ranged archers fighting against waves of enemies. Your agility and strategic thinking will give you an edge to victory.

Unlock new powerful fighters and accurate archers by combining those available for purchase. Place them on the map according to abilities and win.

You will have to discover not only new characters, but also beautiful different worlds, enjoy our new game.

title: SuperPixelint
description:
It's a game where you draw a cute little image.
You can develop color matching skills and accuracy without any burden.
Why don't you get out of your daily life for a while and heal yourself through coloring games?

title: Unlock the Bolts
description: Unlock the Bolts is a challenging puzzle game where you carefully remove screws to solve mechanical puzzles. Each level tests your logic and precision as you figure out the correct order to unlock the bolts. In special levels, the stakes are even higher—you must free trapped animals by unlocking the right bolts! With satisfying mechanics and engaging challenges, this game will keep you thinking and entertained. Can you master every puzzle and rescue the animals in need?

title: Strike Breakout
description: Strike Breakout is an intense rescue mission game where you're part of a specialized team sent to save the President and his security officers. You ride shotgun with a skilled helicopter pilot as you embark on a series of 10 nail-biting missions. Each mission drops you into enemy territory where you must stealthily navigate through enemy defenses, neutralize threats, and rescue the hostages.

title: Hexa Sort Trick or Treat
description: Step into a haunted puzzle realm where glowing hexagonal blocks hide within a web of spooky challenges. Your task: sort eerie, color-coded pieces into their rightful places before the shadows close in. With every drag and drop, you’ll sharpen your wits and unravel chillingly clever layouts that grow trickier as you progress. Easy to pick up yet devilishly addictive, this Halloween brain-teaser will keep players of all ages spellbound through hundreds of spooky levels.

title: Bunnys Farm
description: Embark on a delightful fruit match-3 adventure with Bunny's Farm: Zen Match Master. Join your cheerful companion, Bunny, as you traverse diverse landscapes—from lush meadows and snowy peaks to desert dunes and tropical beaches. Match juicy fruits like oranges and peaches to solve engaging puzzles, uncover enchanting stories, and unlock new chapters in this relaxing yet challenging journey.

title: Royal Pin
description: Royal Pin: King Adventure – A thrilling rescue puzzle game where you save the King, protect the kingdom, and rebuild the castle! Solve tricky pin puzzles, help the queen and princess, and become the ultimate king of this adventure!

title: Pop Puzzle
description: Dive into the vibrant world of Pop Puzzle, a colorful block-busting challenge that tests your strategy and quick thinking. Tap on groups of matching blocks to clear the screen and progress through levels filled with satisfying chain reactions. Simple, addictive, and fun for players of all ages.

title: Barrel Roller - Amazing Runner
description:
Collect and stack barrels, avoid obstacles, and make the highest barrel stack ever! 
Unlimited levels of stacking satisfaction!

title: Emoji Guess
description: Welcome to the entertaining world of Emoji Guess, a game where every emoji hides a clue. Use your creativity and logic to decode famous phrases, sayings, and movie titles represented by emoji sequences. Each level brings a fresh challenge that will test your imagination and make you smile. Play for free on your phone or computer and see how fluent you are in the universal language of emojis!

title: Maze Craze
description: Step into the captivating world of Maze Craze, a puzzle game that combines creativity, humor, and strategic problem-solving. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers, Maze Craze offers an endless journey through a variety of mazes, each with its own unique set of challenges and surprises.

title: SnakeMaxx
description: Dive into thrilling PvP battles or solo runs! Unlock avatars, skins, and boosters to power up your snake in this fast-paced action runner.

title: Badlands Hero
description:
Step into a treacherous world teeming with enemies and peril. Guide your hero across the battlefield — they’ll fire automatically when foes show up!

? Conquer intense levels
? Gain XP to unlock unique heroes
? Gather gold to enhance your gear
? Unleash powerful weapon types
? Face off against epic bosses and climb the ranks

Easy to play, hard to master. Do you have what it takes to rule the Badlands?

title: Happy Town
description:
In Happy Town you have to lead your own city and make its inhabitants happy!

Becoming the mayor of your happy city is very simple! Combine items, upgrade buildings, complete tasks for residents, communicate with them, expand and enjoy a vibrant style and soundtrack. Residents are waiting for you!

title: Off Road Overdrive
description: Off Road Overdrive plays like a side-scrolling car-balanced game with 2D cartoon vehicles. Let me introduce the game modes for you!If you want to make a perfect record, play Challenge mode with different terrains again and again including Snow, Beachwear, Field, Desert, and Dark Night. Even the 2D platform will test your driving skills and balance abilities!

title: Bublix: Bubble Hit
description: Bublix: Bubble Hit is a fast-paced bubble shooter where precision and strategy matter. Aim, shoot, and match 3 or more bubbles to clear the board. Use clever angles, wall bounces, and combos to boost your score. With endless gameplay and rising difficulty, it’s perfect for quick, addictive sessions.

title: Block Puzzle Cats
description: Train your brain and solve puzzles with cute cats! Drag and drop the cats onto the puzzle board and try to put them all together! Unique puzzle shapes and ever-changing challenges will train your brain to think in a whole new way. Can you fit all the cats in? Collect cute new cats as you beat each puzzle challenge.Now come and join the fun and challenging game world.

title: Blocksss
description:
Blocksss is challenging, exciting and sometimes infuriating minimalist puzzle game. Enjoy the world's most beloved puzzle game for FREE!
Easy to play, and pleasurable game for all ages.

title: Word Connect Puzzle
description: Word Connect Puzzle is a relaxing yet brain-boosting word game. Swipe letters to form hidden words, unlock new packs, and watch the difficulty rise as your vocabulary grows. Earn stars, complete daily challenges, and use hints when you’re stuck. Play offline anytime, enjoy clean visuals and smooth controls, and chase streak bonuses for higher scores. Perfect for quick sessions or long puzzle runs—smart, simple, and satisfying for all ages.

title: Wonders of Egypt Mahjong
description: Wonders of Egypt Mahjong transports you to the mystical world of Ancient Egypt in this brand-new Solitaire Mahjong game. Play through beautifully designed hand-drawn tiles featuring Egyptian motifs and captivating backgrounds inspired by the wonders of Egypt. With 40 unique new layouts and three smaller tutorial layouts, it’s perfect for both beginners and Mahjong experts. Dive into hours of challenging gameplay and uncover the secrets of the Pharaohs!

title: Phone Case Diy 5
description: Phone Case DIY 5 is a popular Art Game. For children who like this series very much, you must be eager to play this game! In this new DIY phone case game, we changed the style of the game, changing the previous 2D style to the current 3D style. At the same time, we have also added patterns, decorations, stickers, etc. that can be selected. At the same time, we have also added an album function, you can save your masterpieces to the album, and you can view your own artworks at any time.

title: EQ Test Puzzle
description: A puzzle game that tests emotional intelligence through emotion recognition and jigsaw puzzles. Match emotional icons, scenarios, and puzzle pieces to train your emotional awareness and problem-solving skills.

title: Animal Link
description: Animal Link is a puzzle game, the goal is to remove all the squares by eliminating the same pattern. The rules of the game are simple and require a certain amount of observation and quick reaction ability.

title: 100 Rooms Escape
description: This is a brain-burning and challenging escape room online game. Interesting gameplay so you won't get bored. You need to open 100 doors to escape the room. Interact with objects and solve puzzles to complete the tasks in the escape game. Solve the puzzles, and take inventory of the hidden items. You may use them to open the room, move on to the next level, use your skills, and do whatever it takes to escape.

title: Texas Holdem Poker
description: Players compete for winning combinations of cards using their skills and intuition. The game has the ability to bet, bluff and recognize the bluff of other players. Players can choose different difficulty levels and customize their own game rules. The unique interface design and realistic atmosphere allow you to immerse yourself in the world of card games and enjoy the excitement anytime and anywhere.

title: Mr Long Legs
description: Get ready to wobble, stretch, and stumble with Mr. Long Legs, the funniest physics puzzle game you’ll ever play! Step into the shoes of a long-legged stickman hero and control his stretchy legs to cross impossible terrains.

title: Conquer.io
description: Expand your zone and assert your dominance over every territory on the map. Plan your moves to outmaneuver opponents and gain as much space as possible. But beware, your rivals will stop at nothing to thwart your plans. Are you ready to claim your space?

title: Space Blast
description: Space Blast is a 2D game full of action arcade game where your piloting skills and strategic thinking are key to navigating relentless waves of meteors. Command a powerful spaceship equipped with advanced weapons and take on the challenge of protecting the galaxy from incoming threats.

title: Sea Lords
description: Set sail for success in Sea Lords - the fun idle tycoon simulation game where you're the master of the seas. Start with a small fishing port and gradually build your global shipping empire! Manage ships, upgrade docks, hire captains, and automate your logistics as you conquer new routes and earn riches - even while you're offline! It's time to prove your skills as the next sea lord! Buy and upgrade ships to boost your delivery speed and cargo capacity.

title: Palkovil The Way Home
description: Explore the magical world of Palkovil! Battle monsters, solve puzzles, collect toys, and uncover secrets. Feed pets, defeat bosses, and save the New Year in this festive adventure. Dive into quests and bring the Christmas tree home in this exciting online game!

title: Dino Ranch
description:
JON & BLITZ - IT’S VELOCI-TIME!
• Throwing the lasso to the escaped compies
• Dodging herds of ankylosaurus.
• Finding the naughty compies.
• Feeding Angus.
• Flying and dodging objects with Pteddy
• Moving the dinosaurs to the stable.
• Challenging the Trihorn Raptor to a race.
• Helping the compies to jump across the river.

title: Fish rain 2
description:
"Cast and pull!" is the motto of this fishing game. Everything is real here: the sounds in the locations, and the online chat. Share your legendary trophies with other players, show off your catch, and name the weight and type of fish.

 Try to catch a pike or a catfish, a perch or a minnow, or maybe a carp or a sturgeon?

 Fish in different locations: on a rocky shore or on the Pripyat River. Use a variety of baits, from worms to live bait and leeches.

title: Square Punki Long Hand
description: Ever wondered what life would be like with super long arms? In Square Punki Long Hand, you get to experience just that! This unique puzzle game challenges you to stretch, grab, prank, and solve hilarious puzzles using your extra-long limbs. Whether you're rescuing trapped characters, reaching impossible places, or pulling off mischievous tricks, every level is filled with surprises and laughter!

title: Solitaire Klondike: Eternal Russian Classic
description:
Rediscover the captivating world of Solitaire Klondike!

This timeless card game not only entertains but also enhances logical thinking, offering hours of engaging pastime. Play your favorite solitaire anytime, anywhere.

Join the community of enthusiasts and prove your mastery in Klondike!

Keep an eye on the leaderboard and become the top player among all!

title: Isometric Escape
description: Isometric is an escape game where you solve a series of puzzles to escape from isometric rooms. Find all the useful objects and use your logic and memory to solve the riddles.

title: Zombie Monster Survivors
description: Zombie Monster Survivors is a role-playing game where you will become a brave survivor. Fight against terrifying zombies and monsters in an amazing world. Use your resources wisely and defeat the monsters and zombies that keep coming. Try to survive in this extreme environment. Keep moving and attack large waves of zombies. Collect coins or energy and choose your skills.

title: Dot by Dot
description:
Dot By Dot is a relaxing puzzle game where you have to connect dots into lines and get amazing drawings. Once you connect all the dots and lines, the drawing will be automatically colored! Enjoy the addictive puzzle game!
Let the Dot by Dot game develop your creativity and skills. Draw a line, connect colored dots and see what kind of drawing you get.

title: Shadowman Runner
description:
Shadowman Runner is a dark, atmospheric endless runner inspired by the minimalist silhouette style of Limbo and the fast-paced arcade spirit of games like Soul Knight and Alto’s Adventure. Set in a mysterious black-and-shadow world, the game challenges your reflexes, timing, and focus.
You play as a lone runner sprinting through a dangerous jungle landscape. Your goal is simple yet addictive: run as far as you can, collect potions to score points, and survive.

title: One HERO
description:
One Hero: Dive into the ultimate action-packed shooting game! Play as a lone hero, dodging and shooting your way through waves of enemies. Eliminate all foes to claim victory. Are you ready to be the last one standing?
Dive into a thrilling, action-packed adventure where you’ll face waves of enemies and intense boss battles.
With intuitive controls and accessible gameplay, players of all skill levels can jump in and start unleashing chaos in no time.

title: Thief Stick Puzzle Man Escape
description: Enjoy a hilarious and brain-twisting adventure in Thief Stick Puzzle: Man Escape. It’s a mix of stickman comedy, clever puzzle levels, and funny escape challenges that will keep you hooked for hours! You play as a sneaky thief stickman trying to escape from tricky situations. To survive, you’ll need to solve smart brain teaser puzzles. For example, finding the correct path through a maze to obtain treasure, or bypassing a cutting machine to save a puppy.

title: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby
description: Epic Car Stunt Race Obby is a fast-paced, acrobatic and challenging stunt racing game. In these races with hundreds of different levels, each new track creates a completely different excitement with its special design. You can play Epic Car Stunt Race Obby against AI racers or with your friend in 2 player mode. Start the endless racing excitement now!

title: Cinema Business - Idle Games
description:
Build and manage your own cinema empire! 
Unlock movie rooms, snack and burger corners to attract more customers.
Hire staff, upgrade facilities, and keep your theater running smoothly.
Earn cash even while you’re offline and grow your business.
Become the ultimate cinema tycoon in this fun idle arcade game!

title: Cube Speed Dash
description: Jump, dash, and survive in Cube Speed Dash, a high-speed arcade challenge where every second counts! Master lightning-fast reflexes as you guide a nimble cube through treacherous obstacle courses filled with spikes, traps, and deadly pitfalls. One wrong move—and it’s game over!

title: Flick 'n Bounce
description: Tap to bounce enemies, use powerful props, and survive in this fast-paced stickman battle! Don't let enemies get close—bounce them all away and master the chaos! Ready for the challenge?

title: Hero Transform Run
description: Superheroes accumulate energy by constantly upgrading themselves, and at the end of the level they must quickly defeat different enemies. This is a casual combat parkour game!

title: Love Tile Trio
description: Welcome to the Valentine's Day tile matching game! Your mission is to match and clear tiles from the board. Tap a tile and move it to an empty space or a spot with a matching tile. If no matches are available or there's no room, you'll need to try again. With a countdown timer and tricky puzzles, can you beat the Love Tile challenge?

title: Slidee
description: In this sliding-puzzle game you will have to make your way by painting the walls. Along the way you'll encounter spikes, portals, and collapsing walls.

title: Kitkat Puzzle
description:
Enter the world of Kitkat Puzzle, a captivating and intricate pin puzzle game where your strategic thinking and creativity are put to the test.

The mission is straightforward - unlock kitkat holes to make these chocolate bars fall in the correct sequence. Sounds simple, yet with unlimited levels of varying complexity, it promises an intriguing brain-teasing journey.

title: Fill The Bottle
description:
Fill The Bottle is a puzzle online game for all ages. The design of the canisters is different at each level, which makes you think about how to get the ball in the limited space without crossing
the line. Test your skill in maneuvering the balls and pass the levels with increasing difficulty.This fun and addictive game will keep you hooked as you come
up with clever ways to place the balls and unlock all the levels!

title: Hamstercycle
description:
Help a genius hamster bust out of a mad professor's lab on his slick DIY ride - the Hamstercycle!

Jump across furniture and whatever junk the prof left lying around to reach the portal at the end of each room. But watch out - the floor is guarded by laser sensors! Touch it, and the hamster gets caught!

Fun physics, simple controls, and hundreds of exciting levels await!

title: Road Race 3d
description: Road Race 3D is an exciting racing game that allows you to ride on a challenging track! You will experience the perfect combination of 3D racing and parkour. Use flexible operation and quick reaction to win every game! To draw a vehicle, a vehicle will randomly appear for you.

title: Build A Queen 2025
description: In Build a Queen 2025, you will embark on a fun journey to become a real queen. You will need to make your way through different platform levels with your opponents. Choose outfits, skin colors, and more according to your goals. Dress up in the most glamorous queen look, meet the prince, and win. You can collect money to unlock more dance steps.

title: Stickman Ragdoll Playground
description: Build-A-Flop: The Sickman Playground is not just a game—it's a people's playground of laughter and creativity! With its whimsical world and endless opportunities for hilarity, it's sure to become a favorite among players of all ages.

title: Idle Airport CEO
description:
Step into the shoes of a savvy CEO and take control of your very own airport!

As you progress, collect passengers and upgrade your capabilities to increase plane capacity, speed, and efficiency. Optimize check-in times, revenue streams, and airline services to keep your customers happy and coming back for more.

Oh, and did we mention that your money is piling up as we speak? Go offline, return and claim profits.

title: Twinkle Shooter
description: Shoot at stones of the same color to drop them. They can be cleared when three or more of the same color are matched. If a stone enters the heart, the slot spins for a fever chance! The game is over if the stones reach the bottom.

title: Robot Runner Fight
description: Are you ready for a robotic parkour adventure? Robots run and fight on high-speed parkour platforms!  Youll control a flexible robot that travels through the city of the future. Avoid obstacles, fight enemies, and race to the finish line.

title: Ninja Time
description: Immerse yourself in the world of samurai and ninjas in Ninja Time. Stretch your bamboo stick to navigate increasingly complex levels, collecting coins for new ninja skins. Experience Japan's martial arts era and become the ultimate ninja legend!

title: V And N Pizza Cooking Game
description: Experience the ultimate virtual pizza-making adventure with the V And N Pizza Cooking Game! Craft delicious pizzas from scratch, choose mouthwatering toppings, and master the art of baking. From classic favorites to innovative creations, unleash your inner chef and create culinary masterpieces.

title: Black Cat Stacking POP
description: Tap tiles to clear them! When you tap a tile, any same-colored tiles next to it will also connect and clear together. Clear a bunch of tiles at once, and a toy mouse will appear to help clear even more! Clear target tiles or tiles that add moves to increase your remaining moves. The game ends when you run out of moves.

title: Dungeon Master – Cult & Craft
description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of a mysterious dungeon, where you are its keeper and master! Turn simple stickmen into devoted followers capable of mining ore and creating value for your dark empire. Develop the Cult, manage resources and expand the boundaries of your underground Universe!

title: Devs Simulator
description: Welcome to the world of high technology and business! In this exciting strategy game you will become the director of a thriving IT company. Your task is to find the best programmers, assemble a dream team and lead it to success!

title: Avoid The Spikes
description: Jump and dodge all the spikes to avoid dying, get score for each touch of the wall and get gems while jumping to then be able to buy new skins in the in-game store in which there are 22 to unlock in exchange for the gems obtained.

title: Head Soccer Arena
description: Head Soccer Arena takes you into a fast-paced football world! Play 2-player matches on the same device, dive into quick games, or rise through 15 leagues in Career Mode. Win matches, collect coins and diamonds, and upgrade your power-ups—ice, lightning, anvil, big head, and more! Unlock new characters and dominate the field with strategy, skill, and speed. Every match is a step toward football glory!

title: TB Avataria Life Girl
description:
Hey, how about helping me decorate my house? You need to decorate my home beautifully, buy me nice clothes, and feed me. Let's get started — right now, I have an empty house, and we need to furnish it together. Let's make it look organized and cozy! Before I get too hungry, you must take me to the café to eat, or I might lose my life from hunger!
We also need to earn money. To make money, reach the computer and use the money-making app. You can either buy things or continue earning more money!

title: Diamond mosaic
description: Ready to create your own masterpiece from a scattering of diamonds on your screen? Come to our mosaic!  Fill images with diamond scatter!

title: Sneaker Factory!
description: Manage your own sneaker factory in this fast-paced online game! Complete orders, organize sneakers, deliver shipments, and rise through the ranks. Put your speed, strategy, and management skills to the test to become the city’s leading factory!

title: Bingo Halloween
description: A Halloween-themed bingo game where you can win exciting bingos to unlock spooky candy-themed images. Enjoy multiple call speeds and progressive unlocks.

title: Stunt Bike Rider Bros
description: Stunt Bike Rider Bros is a motorcycle racing and show game that you can play in both 1 player and 2 player mode with your friend. There are 3 different game modes in the game. In the "Racing Mode", you can compete with both your friend and other motorcycle drivers. In the "Career Mode", try to complete the difficult stages in a limited time. In the "Open World", you can earn coins and diamonds by performing various stunts with your motorcycles.

title: Bike Stunt Racing Legend
description: Bike Stunt Racing Legend is not merely a motorcycle racing but also a balanced stunt simulation game. Under a 3D game engine, you are required to ride the motorbike to the finish line in the first place. As long as you can keep high speed, the AI opponent will make mistakes and lose you. Don't be afraid of rolling ramps, pass the green arrows to speed up more easily. Keep calm and step on the gas!

title: Happy ASMR Care
description: Happy ASMR Care is a fun cleaning simulator game. When life starts to get messy, its time to clean. This game offers you four modes of cleaning, including cleaning turtle barnacles, carpet cleaning, shaving, and hoof trimming. What do you prefer to clean? Come join us to start your cleaning journey!

title: Poopy Escape The Prison
description: Help Poopy, a mischievous (and slightly stinky) inmate, break out of a maximum-security prison! Navigate through hazardous cells, evade ruthless guards, solve puzzles, and uncover hidden paths to escape. But beware—one wrong move, and Poopy lands in solitary confinement!

title: Cannon Merge
description: Beat off waves of snow monsters, connect cannons to get more and more improved cannon models. Monsters are strong and there are a lot of them, they constantly attack. Upgrade the base and guns, defeat them all!

title: Tralala La La La italiano
description: Immerse yourself in an exciting adventure! In this game you will have to connect Italian animals. Collect a collection of rare animals, discover new species and create your own virtual zoo!

title: Black Pink Halloween Concert
description: Step into the spooky spotlight with Black Pink Halloween Concert, a thrilling dress-up game where you style the K-Pop superstars for their haunted Halloween performance. Choose from a wide variety of creepy-cute costumes, bold hairstyles, and festive accessories to make the members shine on stage.

title: Dream Mania Happy Match
description: Ready to begin a fantastic match-3 puzzle adventure? Dream Mania - Happy Match is a fun puzzle game that you won't be able to stop playing. It's easy to play, yet the challenging level design. It's a casual game you don't want to miss! Match 3 or more identical items to clear the board and hit your level goals.

title: SPRUNKI 3D Escape
description: Sprunki Phase 10 lets players experiment with various musical elements represented by characters, each producing sounds like beats, melodies, or effects. Players create original compositions or follow sequences by combining these elements to unlock special musical bonuses. This edition in the Sprunki series adds new layers, making it a refreshing iteration for fans of the music-mixing genre.

title: Plants Vs Zombies War
description: Plants Vs Zombies War is based on the famous PC game called Plants VS Zombies. This tower-defense strategy game needs your plans to fight against 15 kinds of incoming zombies. You can check the consumption and attack of all of your 15 plants before the battle. Then the tutorial will show the basic rules and plants at Level 1. The more levels you complete, the more plants you can unlock. You could also unlock them from ads in advance.

title: Fighter Stick Hero
description: Welcome to Figher Stick Hero Stickman, an exhilarating 2D stickman game that will test your dueling skills. Whether you're playing in an arcade or survival mode, get ready to engage in intense battles against your opponents. Choose from a variety of weapons, character colors, and character decorations to customize your stickman. Remember to attack while moving to gain an advantage and earn higher scores by defeating other stickmen.

title: Hotfoot Baseball
description:
Simple baseball game with fun, cartoony players and easy one-click controls. It’s fast to learn and fun to play!

Unlike other baseball games, the action doesn’t stop after you hit the ball. You need to decide when to run, move to the next base, and try to score runs. It’s all about timing and quick decisions.

Pick one of the best baseball countries and try to win the championship. The game keeps the excitement of baseball but with simple rules, so anyone can enjoy it.

title: Dice Puzzle
description: Dice Puzzle is a smart, satisfying merge game where you place numbered dice on a grid to combine matches and build higher values. Plan ahead, manage limited space, and handle dice that appear solo or in pairs. Every move matters—chain merges, grow your numbers, and test your strategy in this addictive dice challenge.

title: Connect Em All
description: Play Connect Em All Online and Solve Colorful Dot Puzzles. Connect Em All is an exciting and addictive puzzle game that you can enjoy for free right in your browser. The goal is simple yet surprisingly challenging: connect all the dots of the same color to complete each level. It sounds easy at first, but as the puzzles grow in size and complexity, you will need clever thinking and careful planning to succeed.

title: Fury Road Zombie Crash
description: Fury Road Zombie Crash is a 3D game about driving a modified automobile across a zombie-infested landscape. It's enjoyable and addicting, and it came just in time for the apocalypse. In order to remain alive in the face of a zombie apocalypse, you must pilot your preferred vehicle while avoiding the undead. Keep going, race your war vehicle throughout the arena, and annihilate the undead. You can play this and similar games for free on kiz10.com.

title: Holiday Hex Sort
description: In Holiday Hex Sort, drag and drop hex tile stacks onto the board. Merge tiles to form stacks of 10 and collect them. As levels progress, more tile types appear. If there are 10 similar tiles on a stack, they will be collected. Clear all tiles by making stacks of 10 before time runs out !

title: Super Star Animal Salon
description: Welcome to Super Star - Animal Salon, a paws - itively delightful casual simulator game that's perfect for girls with a passion for fashion and animals! In this game, you step into the role of a superstar animal stylist. Your very own salon awaits, filled with all the tools of the trade. First, meet your furry, feathery, or scaly clients. There are cute puppies with a zebra, an elephant, and a leopard. Start with the hair.

title: Backflip Master
description: Backflip Master is the most popular in sports' game. The main test of the player's mastery of backflips and skills. You need to backflip to reach the finished line. Of course, there will be some obstacles on the way, you must also flip over. So, are you ready to challenge this game now? Come on!

title: My Dreamy Flora Fashion Look
description: Welcome to My Dreamy Flora Fashion Look. Girls! You know that spring is on its way when you see the trees starting to bud and bloom, and the bulbs you planted last fall start to sprout out of the ground. Join with Ellie and their friends to celebrate the most beautiful and colorful season.

title: Mind Games: Math Crosswords
description:
Mind Games: Math Crosswords is a game to improve your math skills. It is a great way to spend your time. 
The player's mission is to save the planet from extinction. The aliens have destroyed all the plants on the planet. However, humans have found a solution. Engineers have built ships that convert brain activity into life-giving energy to grow plants. By solving mathematical problems, you are contributing to the restoration of plants and the regeneration of our planet.

title: Daily Jewels Blitz Mahjong
description: Enjoy Daily Mahjong with a sparkling jewels twist! Play a unique layout every day, match dazzling gem tiles, and keep your streak alive to earn boosters like Hint, Shuffle, Undo, and Torch. Track your longest streak and collect daily rewards as you match your way through beautiful designs. Miss a day? There’s a rare chance to recover it. Relax, match, and dive into the timeless charm of Daily Mahjong with a brilliant jewels theme!

title: Pixel Shoot
description: Pixel Shoot is a fast-paced arcade puzzle game. It's simple to play by just tapping the cannons. Make sure you pay attention to the color and base your strategy around it. You must also manage your capacity, and timing is key! Send your cannons in the right order, manage the flow, and maximize your score.

title: Geometrix
description: Geometrix is a game about guessing the right shape. Defeat the enemies copying their shapes. When you collide with the evil shapes, if you have the same geometrical figure, you will destroy the enemy, otherwise you will lost a health point. Lost more than three points and it will be game over. Face over 40 levels, with increasing difficulty, enemies with up to 6 different geometric figures. You have to be fast and skilled to beat this game. Will you make it? If you want to know it, just try it!

title: School simulator: My school
description:
Welcome to School Simulator: My School! In this game you need to manage your school, open new classrooms, toilets, canteen, hire staff and help students to learn.
The more classes, the more schoolchildren. The more schoolchildren, the more money. The more money, the more opportunities to develop the school.

title: Pesky Moles
description:
An ordinary farmer lived a quiet life and grew vegetables, but at some point, moles began to attack his garden and eat the entire crop.
After the next harvest, he decides to take everything into his own hands and protect his garden.
In Pesky Moles, you have to protect your garden from moles for a certain amount of time. The more pests you manage to neutralize and the more crops you save, the more coins you get. With the coins you earn, you can buy traps that will help you protect your garden.

title: Winter Mahjong
description: You can test your pattern detection skills in this relaxed mahjong & connect puzzle game with winter christmas theme. You can eliminate pair of same tiles. The line connecting the two clicked tiles can't have more than 2 corners. Some levels the tiles can auto slide( to left, to right, to up, to bottom). Can you clear the board before time runs out? Enjoying matching winter tiles with 32 levels in this game.

title: Sand Blast
description:
Sand Blast – A Satisfying Flowing-Sand Puzzle Experience, a relaxing yet strategic puzzle game built on soft, flowing sand physics!
Every block is made of loose, unstable sand — place it, and it instantly crumbles and shifts with gravity. These pieces won’t stay still, so you’ll need to think ahead and plan every move carefully.

title: Tower Stack 2026
description:
​Tap the screen or click the mouse to drop the block. The goal is to stack blocks perfectly and build the highest tower possible. It requires timing and precision.
Stack the blocks as high as you can! Test your precision and timing in this addictive arcade game.

title: Bubble Blitz Galaxy
description: Welcome to Bubble Blitz Galaxy! Aim and shoot bubbles towards similar ones to collect them while ensuring they stay away from the borderline. Experience two exciting modes: In Arcade Mode, strive to survive as long as possible and score as much as you can. In Challenge Mode, survive and achieve target scores, facing new challenges one after another. Get ready for an exhilarating bubble-blasting adventure!

title: Archery Ragdoll
description: Embark on an adrenaline-pumping adventure in this action-packed online game featuring thrilling ragdoll archer physics. Master the art of archery and prove your prowess!

title: Small Wardrobe
description: Small Wardrobe is a casual game designed specifically for cotton dolls. Collect and create beautiful and cute dresses for your cotton dolls, and experience heartwarming and fun stories. The game offers a variety of adorable doll clothes, shoes, and accessories. Let's happily organize and tidy up the doll's wardrobe together!

title: Ropeway Master
description:
Ropeway Master is a new challenging puzzle game. You should utilize the rope to free everyone,control the rope, overcome the obstacles, and complete the demanding and unique puzzle game. The
game is not difficult! Drag the rope to make a safe path, control the rope, and rescue everyone.Don't forget to avoid the obstacles along the way. If you play Rope Puzzle, make sure you do nothing. You will play for hours and linger.

title: Save my Hero
description:
Players may enjoy a unique gaming experience in Save my Hero Online, an engaging puzzle game that revolves on drawing lines. You take on the role of a superhero under assault from missiles in the game. It is your responsibility to create lines to stop these projectiles and shield the hero.

Finish every level and attempt to rescue the superheroes, such as Iron Man, Batman, Spider-Man, and so on.

title: Sort And Style: Back To School
description: Step into the world of Sort And Style: Back To School, a fun mix of sorting and dress-up games for girls! Organize messy desks, lockers, wardrobes, and even bento boxes across 9 exciting levels. Then, challenge your creativity in the final dress-up unit where you style your school look with trendy uniforms, shoes, hairstyles, and accessories. Perfect for fans of organizing games, makeover fun, and school fashion challenges!

title: Cleaning Simulator
description:
Cleaning Simulator is a very fun simulation game. Although this game is 2D, it restores the shape of objects in real life very well. This game has a total of 12 parts, covering sports cars, technological products, daily necessities, and other elements, which will definitely meet all your
expectations for cleaning games. Want to know more about this game? Come and try it!

title: Dragon Island Idle 3d
description: Welcome to Dragon Island Idle 3D, a casual idle 3D world. Raise your dragons and build a wonderful island empire. Unlock all facilities to get income. For example, unlock a new pasture to raise more dinos. Unlock synths for the new area. Unlock the incubator to get dinos.

title: Gym Muscle Merge Tycoon
description: Gym Muscle: Merge Tycoon is an addictive game where you create your team of fighters and transform them into real muscle heroes. Connect fighters to strengthen their muscle mass, improve their characteristics, and earn profit. Participate in fighting tournaments to compete for cool rewards and become the most powerful fighter of all time!

title: Hole Eat Grow Attack
description:
Eat objects, and ammos, and attack other holes around. Two unique game modes, time attack and infinite modes are waiting for you. Let your hole battle begin in the arena against the other holes.

The game consists of two levels Time Attack and Infinite. There are more than 20 characters. You can play the game either in single-player mode or in 2 player mode. Pick your hole fighter and start the game. You can activate player 2 with keys. Make sure you avoid larger-hole enemies around.

title: Fun Town Parking
description: Funtown Parking is an exciting parking simulation game where you must follow paths and park in designated spots while avoiding obstacles and challenges. As the levels progress, the routes become more complex, testing your precision and driving skills. Can you navigate through the chaos and park without a scratch? Take on the challenge and master every level!

title: Tung Tung Sahur in Geometry Dash
description: Join Tung Tung Sahur, the wooden drum-carrying dawn caller, as he bounces and flips through a neon cityscape just before sunrise! Dodge spikes, leap over traps, and time your jumps to the beat of his signature “tung-tung!” calls. In this Geometry Dash–inspired challenge, the streets are alive with glowing gates, speed pads, and tricky gravity flips. Can you drum your way to the end without missing a beat?

title: Police Chase Drifter
description:
Police Chase Drifter is a fun car game where you get to run from the police, collect money bags and reach to the finishline.
Earn money to buy more cars, fasters and enjoy the drifting.

title: Pumpking vs Mummy
description: Are you ready for a competitive game between the mummy and the pumpkin king on Halloween? Yes, someone has to win on Halloween! Team up with a friend and choose to be either the mummy or the pumpkin king. Collect as many flying pumpkins as you can! You can earn money by eating candies, and by gathering all the pumpkins, you can win the game. Catch the balloons and take them to the treasure chest. The one who collects and brings them back the fastest wins.

title: Lovie Chic's Coachella Festival
description: Step into the vibrant world of Lovie Chic’s Coachella Festival, the ultimate festival dress-up game! Style your character with trendy outfits, accessories, and makeup to shine at the iconic Coachella Festival. With simple controls and endless creativity, Lovie Chic’s Coachella Festival is perfect for quick fun or long gaming sessions.

title: Office Knight 3D: Castle Defense
description:
Office Warrior: Wield swords and axes as skillfully as a stapler!
Action Battles: Fight various enemies in dynamic 3D environments.
Progression System: Level up, improve health and damage right in the heat of battle.
Weapon & Upgrade Shop: Collect coins to buy hero upgrades and equip yourself.
Endless Challenge: Deflect waves of enemies and prove you are the ultimate defender!

title: Screw Jam!
description:
Let's embark on a mechanical journey like no other in Screw Jam Puzzle. Your mission is to untwist screws and put them in the right screw boxes. You win when completing all the screw sets.

FEATURES
- Addictive gameplay, help you relax and train your brain
- ASMR Screw game: Beautiful design with satisfying in-game sounds

This challenging and addictive Screw jam game will put your problem-solving skills to the test as you twist, turn, and put all the screws into right screw boxes.

title: No Pain No Gain - Ragdoll Sandbox
description: A ragdoll sandbox physics game where you place traps, cause pain, and earn coins for every hit. The more it hurts, the more you get.

title: Farm Mahjong 3D
description: Have you ever imagined playing your favorite 3D mahjong game in a farm setting? Mahjong 3D Farm does just that! It brings the popular Mahjong 3D game into the charming world of farms, filled with adorable animals, crops, and farming tools for you to match! So why wait? Play Mahjong 3D Farm Connect now and solve the puzzle amidst the fields!

title: Emoji Sort – Fun Puzzle Game
description:
Emoji Sort is a fun and addictive sorting puzzle game where you match and organize cute emojis into the right tubes! Test your logic, plan your moves carefully, and enjoy hundreds of relaxing levels. Simple to play yet hard to master — perfect for puzzle lovers and casual gamers alike.

Play now and see if you can complete every emoji challenge!

Features: smooth animations, colorful visuals, satisfying gameplay, and brain-teasing fun made for everyone!

title: Animal Racing Idle Park
description: Animal Racing: Idle Park is an addictive racing animal transform game that will keep you playing for hours. In this game, you’ll train multiple animal racers such as lions, eagles, orangutans, dolphins, and more!

title: Extreme Car Driving Simulator
description: Extreme Car Driving Simulator is recommended as a hard-core car driving simulation game. Under a 3D realistic game engine, you can play 4 different game modes to test your driving skills. In the Open World Mode, you can get missions on the road to transport passengers. In the Parking Mode, you can park the car in extremely difficult environments. I hope you have enough confidence to challenge them and buy another 6 better cars.

title: Emoji Merge Fun Moji
description: Welcome to Emoji Merge: Fun Moji! A fun and creative jigsaw puzzle that allows you to merge various funny emojis. Create super funny, super cute emoji combinations. It's not just a simple merger game and full of interesting challenges.

title: Angry City Smasher
description: Angry City Smasher is a third-person RPG fighting simulation game with 3D-armed gorillas. Your goal is to defeat the enemy monster and destroy the marked number of buildings. Use the Ultimate Smash to make AOE damage and destroy more buildings with one hit. To be honest, it is necessary to defeat your opponent first because it will run to you on the level. No one wants to be disturbed by others. Good luck!

title: Gun Builder
description: Defeat all incoming enemies, and protect yourself from attacks! Pick up props to strengthen your attacks, but be careful—once your health reaches zero, the mission is over. Ready to experience the action? Play now!

title: Sky Balls 3D
description: Sky Balls 3D invites you on an adventure as you travel through the sky with rolling balls and test your reaction skills. Keep the ball on the track without letting it fall and watch out for obstacles, traps and gaps! Collect coins and keys along the way to get new ball skins and sky-boxes. You can play the game in 1 player and 2 player modes.

title: Stack Sorting
description: Welcome to Stack Sorting! Your task is to organize colorful cylinders by clicking on stacks. Move the topmost cylinder to an empty stack or one with a matching top cylinder. Navigate through Easy Mode with plenty of stacks and time, or challenge yourself in Hard Mode with fewer stacks. Complete all levels within the time limit to emerge victorious!

title: Zero to Millionaire!
description:
"Zero to Millionaire!" is an immersive life simulator where you rise from poverty to wealth! Start with simple jobs, earn your first money, and work your way up: open businesses, buy luxury houses, sports cars, stylish clothes, and build romantic relationships. Upgrade your skills, make life choices, and build a career or entrepreneurial empire. Live the life you’ve always dreamed of!
How far can you climb in Real Life?

title: L.O.L. Surprise Game Zone
description: Hi, B.B.s, welcome to the big city of L.O.L. Surprise! where you will visit the coolest shops, full of games and surprises.

title: Solitaire Tail
description: Raise your dragons at Solitaire! Clear the game by moving all cards to the foundation! Move cards from the tableau or stockpile in ascending order of the same suit. In the tableau, you can stack cards in descending order with alternating colors! You can place a King card in an empty column! When there are no available moves, you can draw cards from the stockpile to the foundation or tableau!

title: Car Out Jam
description:
Car Parking. A puzzle game with cars and passengers.
Complete interesting levels with various mechanics!
The game will be interesting for both who want to relax leisurely and for those who like to unravel complex moves.
Easy levels are combined with more difficult ones. And some will be a real challenge for your brain!

title: Pixel Path
description:
Pixel Path is a platformer with a non—standard plot.?
Get to the portal at the end of the level to win, but it's not as easy as it might seem... The floor may collapse, the spikes will move on you, and your character will grow to huge sizes. One wrong step and the game is over.❌
You will have to keep your sanity, expect surprises, show a good reaction and most importantly: do not get angry.?
The game also has a table of the best players who completed all levels faster than the rest.

title: Real Drive 3D
description:
Are you ready to experience unique car-driving gameplay? Start with your SUV and unlock new vehicles as you progress through the game, playing different and unique levels. Drive your favorite vehicles, and navigate your way around new challenging environments.

We welcome all racing car game fans to experience this new driving game! Real Drive 3D is a car simulation game which will give you a unique arcade experience.

title: Sprunki Lava Escape 2Player
description: Together with your friend, you must save the Sprunki characters from the rising lava. You must be very careful. The lava is rising, and you're in danger. Escape the lava with 6 different characters and jump as high as you can. An endless jumping and lava escape awaits you. Collect all the music notes along the way. You need the music notes.

title: Ellie and Ben Christmas Eve
description: Celebrate the magic of the holiday season with Ellie and Ben Christmas Eve, a delightful game where players join Ellie and Ben as they prepare for the most wonderful night of the year. From decorating the tree to picking the perfect outfits, this game brings the charm of Christmas to life in a fun and interactive way.

title: Pretty Sheep Run
description: Play a fun arcade game in Pretty Sheep Run. You guide an adorable little sheep dashing across endless platforms. Keep your sheep running while cleverly avoiding dangerous traps. Control your sheep running to shoot different numbered doors. Change the numbers into positive numbers. Thus increasing the gun's DMG, ATK SPD, etc. Reach the finish line and shoot farther to get rewards. Keep buying guns and merging the same two guns to get upgrades.

title: Granny 2 asylum horror house
description:
Play this chilling 3D game Granny 2 asylum horror house this game is the continuation of the famous Granny game, a horror game, escape, shoot, collect items. This time you will appear inside an abandoned asylum, you will have some clues to complete and survive.

Move around the asylum, don't stop moving because they will find you at any moment. If you don't have time, you can hide in the closets and not make noises.

title: Agent Zero: Infiltration
description: Step into Agent Zero: Infiltration, the ultimate spy game packed with stealth action and secret missions. Sneak past guards, hack security, and escape dangerous traps while completing thrilling puzzles. Perfect for fans searching “stealth game,” “spy puzzle,” or “escape game,” this free adventure tests your skills and strategy. Outsmart enemies, unlock levels, and prove you’re the top undercover agent in this addictive mission challenge!

title: Machine City Balls
description: Machine City Balls is a ball parkour game. A must play game for those who like challenges. Collect rare balls and complete all ball game challenges to become a winner! Are you ready? Start your parkour journey now!

title: Wednesday Light Academia
description: Join the trend in Wednesday Light Academia - a fun, immersive makeover game for girls! Today you're becoming a super-talented stylist and your job is to transform Wednesday Addams from a dark e-girl look to a stunning girly-girl fashionista. Explore the fun realms of makeup, hairstyling, and fashion-forward wardrobe choices with this addictive game. Have fun!

title: Gomu Goman
description: With simple tap-and-drag gameplay, Gomu Goman offers hundreds of challenging and laugh-out-loud levels. Each level is a unique puzzle that demands creativity—and a certain degree of spicy humor from you.

title: Save The Sheep
description: Save The Sheep offers an immersive mental challenge as you step into the shoes of a shepherd. Relentless wolves have invaded your flock, seeking to feast on your precious sheep. Safeguard your flock by strategically placing wooden stakes to separate them from the predators. Experience the electrifying thrill of rescuing sheep and demonstrate your unmatched intellect in this captivating game.

title: Brainrot Evolution
description: Welcome to the world of meme Italian animals - a dynamic arcade game where you control unique creatures, destroy the environment, gather resources, and unlock new animals. Your goal is to evolve and progress further, unlocking more and more unusual meme beasts. Help yourself with pets: each one provides advantages and strengthens your character. Explore levels, destroy objects, collect useful resources, and unlock the next stage of evolution.

title: Brawl Bros Squad
description: Introducing a new exciting third-person shooter — Brawl Bros Squad! Fight opponents in a variety of conditions. Discover a variety of unique skins to make yourself unique. Enjoy dynamic jumps, accurate shooting and get ready for intense battles. Become a real champion among players around the world and prove that you are the best in this crazy world!

title: Tank Stars
description: Are you ready for an action-packed 2D tank warfare? Welcome to the Tank Stars, one of the best battle tank games that you can play with friends online & offline. Find the right shooting angle and unleash your iron force against your foe's war machines! Make the right shot quickly or you'll lose!

title: Power Light
description: Move the tiles around until the power can flow freely to the light bulb. Power up the light bulb to complete each level in this fun online puzzle game

title: Mojicon Garden Connect
description: Looking for a relaxing puzzle break? The 6th Mojicon game is here to help you unwind! Mojicon Garden Connect brings the beauty of spring right to your screen. Connect colorful tiles at your own pace and watch the garden come to life. As you play, you'll unlock 20 fun, hidden Discoveries featuring adorable garden friends. Now lighter and smoother than ever, it’s the perfect polished puzzle for your downtime.

title: Xmas Presents Mahjong
description: Match three of the same tiles. Click on a tile to move it to the collection spots at the bottom. If you have collected three of the same tiles there, they will be removed.

title: Jump Up 3D: Basketball Game
description: Jump Up 3D is a sports basketball game where you shoot to get that slam dunk, but the one hitch is you're doing it by jumping on a trampoline. Not your ordinary basketball game, this one promises and delivers the excitement! Take aim, bounce on the trampoline, and score baskets before your opponent. With intuitive controls and addictive gameplay, it tests your precision and unleashes your inner dunk master.

title: Idle Dice 3D: Incremental Game
description:
In this game, you roll dice and accumulate coins. Upgrade dice to generate more coins, even when you are not actively playing (Offline earnings).

Idle Dice 3D stands out with its variety of dice: from classic six-sided to dice with 2, 4, 8, 10, 12, and 20 sides. Aim for combinations like pairs, triples, straights, and more to increase profit.

The Prestige system allows you to reset your progress to boost future earnings, adding a strategic element to the game. The game also has achievements.

title: Racing Ball Adventure
description:
Race down massive slopes at high speed through stunning green plains, cliffs, and canyons!
In this thrilling arcade adventure, collect the mystical Crystal to save the world from an impending disaster.
Grab your sphere and start your journey — an epic low-poly adventure awaits!

title: Cornhole League - Board Games
description: Cornhole League is a thrilling twist on the classic backyard game where you aim, toss, and score your way to victory. Compete in intense matches, join tournaments, and showcase your flair with customizable boards and bags. Explore stunning venues, from cozy backyards to grand stadiums. Perfect your toss and rise to cornhole greatness!

title: Inspector Cat
description:
Inspector Cat is a competitive hidden object game where you play as a sharp-eyed cat inspector racing against other feline players!
Each round challenges you to find specific items on a crowded board full of objects. Be faster and more accurate than the other cats to earn points and climb the ranking.
Stay focused, react quickly, and prove you’re the best inspector in the pack!

title: Hidden Object - Girl and Cat
description:
You play as a sweet girl walking through the forest with her cat, Lassie.
Our girl was walking and everything was wonderful: the birds were singing, the flowers were a delight to the eye, and suddenly the cat meowed and ran off into the depths of the forest.
Our girl searched for her cat in the forest for a long time and didn't notice how night had fallen. Wandering through the forest, the girl came across an old house. What if our cat ran in there?

title: Formula Racing Games Car Game
description: Let's Play and Enjoy car driving in all the Formula Race master 3D tracks of the world and become a champion on all the tracks of the world in the Formula Car Racing Game. Formula Car Stunts Games 3D introduces a new offline car racing game for the fans of the Formula Car simulator.

title: Slippery Drift Racing
description: Slippery Drift Racing is an adrenaline-pumping racing game where precision and speed go hand in hand. Players can choose between Race and Time Attack modes, tackling five unique and challenging maps. With three difficulty levels—Easy, Normal, and Hard—drivers of all skill levels can enjoy sliding through tight corners, mastering drifts, and racing against the clock or opponents. Perfect for fans of high-speed thrills and skillful maneuvers, every race promises excitement and challenge!

title: Arrow Escape: Puzzle
description:
“Arrow Escape: Puzzle” is a logic puzzle where arrows block each other, and your goal is to untangle routes and clear the level by choosing the correct move order.

- Short levels you can play in a minute.  
- Focus on logic and move order, not speed.  
- Simple controls: one tap — one move.

title: From Nerd to Popular Ballerina Cappuccina
description:
From Nerd to Popular: Ballerina Cappuccina is a makeover and dress-up game that follows a sweet transformation story. Ballerina Cappuccina starts as a shy, awkward girl with big dreams—and it’s your job to help her glow up and become the confident ballerina she’s meant to be.

Style her through each stage with fabulous outfits, stylish hairstyles, and elegant accessories. As you dress her up, she slowly sheds her insecurities and gains the charm and confidence needed to shine on stage.

title: Stardom Alt-Girls Fashion Duel
description: Welcome to the world of daring alternative glamour! Meet two star heroines - Sydney and Sabrina. Help them go beyond the usual and try on the most daring alternative images: from a gentle soft-grunge princess to a gloomy rock diva. In the game, you can make bright makeup with arrows and sparkles; create unusual hairstyles; collect memorable outfits from tops, corsets, mini skirts and oversized jackets. Create your own collection of stunning Alt-girl looks!

title: Bubble Shooter Pro 4
description: Get ready for Bubble Shooter Pro 4, the ultimate bubble-popping adventure! The latest sequel introduces exciting new features: the explosive Bomb and Firebomb to pop multiple bubbles at once, Bonus Gifts, and collecting Stars to complete Missions. Customize your gameplay with new Props, Frames, and Hats. Dive into the action and enjoy hours of strategic bubble shooting with these thrilling updates!

title: Jump Man
description: A highly addictive endless jumper with a super cute but mischievous character! Chain combos and score as high as you can!

title: Glacier Rush
description: Welcome to "Glacier Rush," an exhilarating endless driving game set in the breathtaking icy landscapes of a frozen world. Brace yourself for an adrenaline-fueled adventure as you navigate treacherous snow-covered terrains, speeding through towering glaciers and sweeping icefields.

title: Through the Wall
description: Get ready for a unique puzzle experience with Through the Wall, where creativity and humor meet strategic problem-solving. Guide your stick figure character through moving walls by striking the perfect pose, with each level presenting new and exciting challenges.

title: Build an Aquapark
description:
? Welcome to the craziest water park! ?

Build your own dream water slide and ride it at full speed! Buy parts, combine them however you like, and create the longest, fastest, and craziest tracks in the game.

title: Mojicon Spring Connect
description:
The 5th Mojicon game is here! Relax and enjoy the peaceful Spring season. Guided by your cheerful and cheeky Bunny companion, embark on a soothing puzzle journey to bring a barren landscape back to life. Match tactile spring tiles to clear the board and earn rewards!

Restore the Meadow: Follow a heartwarming story.
Collect Cards: Find 34 beautiful "Spring Wisdoms".
Relax: Enjoy classic tile-matching mechanics.
Achievements: Go for 100% completion!

title: Spiderlox Theme Park Battle
description: Join a creative and action sandbox adventure in Spiderlox Theme Park Battle! You'll play the role of a superhero Spiderman. Explore a huge theme park. Begin an exciting fight. In the game, you will face many enemies. Use your agility and strategy to win.

title: 3D Basketball.io Dunk Sport
description: Sports Basketball is a thrilling 3D basketball game that will keep you entertained for hours. Whether you're a basketball fan or just love fast-paced Sports games Fun

title: Lovely Cat Pet Life
description: Call for all pet lovers! If you are a DIY enthusiast or enjoy playing with cute animals, join Lovely Cat: Pet Life, a casual DIY cat game online. Dive into this adorable, fun-filled, and creative game that combines the elements of cats, pets, fashion, and DIY all in one perfect package! Play dress-up game: Try out charming suits on your pet. Decorate an ideal look for your kitten. Enjoy minigames unblocked: Join mini animal parkour games with your little cat.

title: Reach 2048
description: The classic 2048 puzzle — slide numbered tiles on a grid, merge them, and reach the legendary 2048 tile! Simple to learn, impossible to put down. Challenge your brain with this addictive number puzzle. Plan your moves carefully, build combos, and aim for the highest score. How far can you go beyond 2048?

title: Yarn Fever! Unravel Puzzle
description: Yarn Fever! Unravel Puzzle is a soothing thread-sorting challenge that blends creativity with logic. Organize colorful yarns across tricky boards, using boosters like the Magic Box, New Hole, or Broom when levels get tough. Customize your setup with extra slots and boxes, and enjoy calm, vibrant visuals. With progressively harder puzzles, it’s both relaxing and rewarding for sorting and puzzle fans alike.

title: Cookie Land
description: Step into Cookie Land, the ultimate sweet Match 3 adventure! Match cookies, candies, pies, donuts, cupcakes, and cotton candies to clear the board and trigger scrumptious chain reactions. Explore a fairytale-like saga map filled with colorful sweets, charming graphics, and a catchy soundtrack. With new treats raining down and endless levels of fun, Cookie Land is the most addictive, mouth-watering Match 3 game for all sweet lovers!

title: 2 Cars Run
description: 2 Cars Run is a dual racing game where you need to control the vehicle to avoid all obstacles. The difficulty of this game is that you have to control one car while taking care of the other. Well, are you ready to challenge this game now? Come on!

title: FNF Unblocked​ Italian Brainrot
description: Face a funny musical battle. FNF Unblocked - Italian Brainrot brings the classic FNF gameplay into the chaotic world of Italian brainrot. Hit the right arrow keys on beat to win rap battles. Face bizarre and iconic opponents like Sponge, Mustard, Sprunki, and other meme legends. Each level has a different style of music, even a little horror, so you can't help but sway to it! In addition, you can experience another gameplay.

title: Bloxorz - Block Puzzle 3d
description: Roll your block across challenging 3D platforms and drop it into the goal hole to solve each puzzle. Bloxorz - Block Puzzle 3d is an addictive block puzzle game that tests your logic, spatial thinking, and problem-solving skills across dozens of mind-bending levels.

title: Move the rubber bands: Logic puzzle
description:
In this game you need to put the rubber bands in their places.
At the start of the level, rubber bands are scattered across the field. Your task is to move the cutters along the pins and place the cutters on the platforms of the corresponding color.
Your task is to solve logic puzzles. It won't always be easy to come up with a solution. Sometimes you will need to strain your logic and ability to navigate in space.

title: Untwist Road
description: Collect cylinders, roll out the road and overcome obstacles in this unique game. It is suitable for all fans of arcade games who like to test their skills and reactions. Try all the features of the game, unlock new levels and beat your records! You only need a few minutes to fully immerse yourself in this exciting game. Try it yourself!

title: Jigsaw M
description: the jigsaw game includes dozens of different puzzles. you can increase or decrease the number of pieces of these puzzles as you wish. so you can make it suitable for all ages. you can have a pleasant time by having fun and exercising your brain. come on we are waiting for you.

title: Arrow Puzzle
description: Arrow Puzzle is a relaxing logic game that turns simple taps into a rewarding challenge. Your goal is straightforward: find a free path, tap arrows in the right order, and enjoy as the maze slowly turns into a clear, empty board. Follow the arrows to escape the puzzle and find a soothing flow that keeps your mind engaged and relaxed.

title: Russian Treasure Hunter
description: You're a prospector in a big mining town: grab your device, head to a location, and search for hidden items. As your device's signal grows, you're near a treasure trove; dig up a find and take it back to town to sell. The game combines tactical exploration, economics, and collecting: clever backpack management, purchasing upgrades, and choosing the right moment to return to town determine whether you'll make a profit or leave empty-handed.

title: Idle Merge Car And Race
description:
An addictive idle car merging game. Build your own car racing company and grow your business.
Move your cars to the racing track and earn money every time they cross the finish line. Buy new cars (or collect them from the gift boxes), and merge the same level cars to upgrade into a new type. The better the cars, the more money you will earn. Use your earnings to buy upgrade packages in the Shop to help you make money faster! Become the richest in the world in this idle merge car game.

title: The Basement isn't THAT haunted
description:
A puzzle game about finding things in a messy basement and avoiding paranormal danger.

As a cute little bunny you look through the boxes stored in the basement and try not to open the ones with ghosts inside.

title: Wild Hunting Clash
description: Challenge yourself and hunt beautiful animals in stunningly luscious woods. The calming sounds of the forest and lovely graphics will capture your heart. Feel like a true hunter in the unconquered wilderness!

title: Help The Duck
description:
Helping Little Duck
In this Skill Game help a charming little duckling to fall into the tub with water. Throw the water in the correct places so that the duckling falls directly into the tub. - Play Helping Little Duck Free and Enjoy!

title: Bubble Tea
description: Bubble Tea – Color Game is all about mixing and matching and blending and fusing a huge assortment of flavors and colors to create cold drink concoctions that will have you licking your lips. Receive orders, choose the right ingredients, pour them all into a cup, and serve to your thirsty customers. Take care not to spill your drinks in the excitement!

title: Impostor among us: Escape from prison
description:
The traitor ended up in a space prison. But the impostor does not plan to stay there for long. You play as an impostor who must go through all the traps, solve puzzles and kill all the enemies on the level. Once the imposter has neutralized all the amogus, he will be able to break out of prison. But the evil among will not let you go into space so easily.

- 100+ varied and colorful levels.
- To kill the enemy you need to approach him.
- Logic tasks and puzzles!
- Boss battles!

title: Merge Brick Breaker
description: Welcome to Merge Brick Breaker, the ultimate fusion of ball merging and brick-breaking action! Get ready to embark on a thrilling adventure that challenges your strategic skills and reflexes.

title: DON'T PANIC DUDE!
description:
Meet DUDE, a sassy AI who thinks you can't beat his game! Trapped in his chaotic simulation, your goal is simple: Jump, avoid deadly spikes, and survive to prove him wrong.

Features:

Fast-paced endless jumping action.

Unlock 40 unique and funny heroes.

Hilarious AI commentary and memes.

Increasing speed and difficulty.

Can you handle the chaos? Don't panic, just jump!

title: Parking Master Urban Challenges
description:
A realistic 3D parking simulator where you can hone your driving skills and become a real parking master!
Get behind the wheel of realistic cars of different sizes and maneuver through crowded city streets, parking in the most difficult places.
Pass all the tests, become a parking master and prove that you can do any maneuver!

title: Draw Brige Puzzle
description:
Draw Bridge Puzzle Game is an exciting and challenging brain game that will put your problem-solving skills to the test.
In this bridge-building adventure, your task is to draw paths for the car to safely navigate through obstacles and reach its destination.
Get ready to embark on a thrilling journey of bridge construction and puzzle-solving as you draw roads to rescue the stranded car!

title: Zombie Drift 3D
description: Zombie Drift 3D is a popular driving game. It doesn't require you to race or race against others, but it also tests your driving skills. You need to control the car to hit everything to make the exit open. Only in this way, you can get the success! Come on!

title: Slide Block Puzzle
description: Slide Block Puzzle is an addictive puzzle game. With no timer or pressure, every move is a calming and satisfying challenge for your brain. Solve color block puzzles, arrange blocks to escape from challenging boxes, a game that provides a fun and satisfying experience.

title: Labubu Merge
description:
Engage, Merge, and Challenge!
Dive into a labubu-matching journey where you collide identical labubu to evolve them and keep them from falling out of the box. But here's the twist: when the same labubus collide, they transform into an entirely new labubu. Can you merge your way to the grand labubu?

title: Fun Mini Games For Kids
description: Welcome to Fun Mini Games For Kids, a casual minigame collection for kids on H5games4u. Are you a game lover? Want to enjoy diverse types of relaxing minigames all in one? Join H5games4u's best kids games. Play doctor simulation games, match shapes in avatar-making games, dress up Brainrot memes, or design room settings.

title: Balloon Pop Frenzy
description:
Balloon Pop Frenzy is a fun and fast-paced tap game where you pop balloons for points!
Tap normal and gold balloons to score, but avoid the tricky skull balloons!
With vibrant visuals, increasing difficulty, and simple controls, it's perfect for quick, casual play on any device.

title: Escape the Horror Craft
description:
Immerse yourself in a thrilling horror adventure set in the Minecraft universe. A regular, unassuming worker in Minecraft's universe becomes disoriented and has to figure out how to get out of each level and map in order to do the jobs.

A Minecraft nightmare comes to life in this eerie, ghostly realm. Stay calm as you navigate the terrain in search of an escape. Is it possible to complete each level without dying? If you're looking for a new game to play, check out kiz10.com.

title: ASMR Makeover & Makeup Studio
description: Get ready to dive into the world of beauty and creativity! ASMR Makeup & Makeover Studio offers an incredible opportunity to give your virtual model a stunning makeover. This isn't just any makeover game — it's an immersive experience that combines relaxation and excitement through the power of ASMR!

title: Monster Squad Rush
description:
