Assemble your squad of powerful monsters, evolve them into champions, and claim victory in the ultimate battle arena. Adventure, strategy, and competition await!

Whether you’re rushing through the course, collecting monsters, or battling for supremacy, Monster Squad Rush offers non-stop action and fun. Build your legacy as the ultimate monster trainer and conquer the arena today!

title: Smartle
description: Smartle is a free online word puzzle game where you rearrange letters by swapping them on a 5x5 grid to form words. Win the game by creating 5 horizontal 5-letter words on the field. There are multiple valid combinations of words which can win the game.

title: Puzzle - LINES AND KNOTS 1
description:
Easy to understand mechanics, swap hexagons with lines.
The goal of the player is to assemble a puzzle consisting of nodes.
▪ 150 Levels
▪ Achievements

title: Squid Challenge: Play to Survive
description: Squid Challenge: Play to Survive is an intense survival game inspired by the thrilling challenges of the popular survival contest. Players must navigate through a series of deadly trials, testing their reflexes, strategy, and nerve. With each level, the difficulty increases, making it a true test of skill and endurance.

title: Neon Blast
description: Upgrade your defense cannons by merging them!Watch as your cannons level up and become powerful defenders, and get exciting new powers to crush bosses and attackers!

title: SWAT Cats Shooter
description: SWAT Cats is an online shooter set in a world where every hero is a battle cat. Ready for purr-fect battle with wild action? Jump in, grab your helmet, and join the fight.

title: Dead Brain
description:
“Dead Brain” puts you in the shoes of a fearless farmer standing between your crops and the undead hordes. With simple controls and intense action, players must strategically use random upgrades to survive each wave and push their limits. 
After each victorious wave, you'll get to choose a random bonus to aid your survival. Gain a new weapon, heal your hero, repair your defenses, or even boost your health!
Are you ready to defend your farm and become the ultimate zombie-slaying hero?

title: Wild Race Master 3d
description: Wild Race Master 3D is an exciting 3D racing game that brings you into a world of extreme speed!In this game, you can experience endless racing fun and drive various cool cars. Challenge the exciting track! ? Drive your beloved racing car through various unique and challenging tracks. You should show excellent driving skills on winding roads and be flexible when dealing with various complex track conditions.

title: Jail Prison Van Police Game
description:
Get ready for action-packed gameplay! Take on the role of a police officer, drive the prison van, and ensure the secure transport of criminals in this exciting Police Bus Game

Immerse yourself in the intense world of law enforcement with the Jail Prison Van Police Game. Assume the role of a dedicated police officer tasked with transporting high-profile criminals in a specially designed prison van.

title: Grow Wars.io
description: The battle between the heroes is beginning in the Grow Wars arena in this great io game! This battle is between the evolution heroes. Step into the arena and start slashing your opponents. Earn coins and buy new equipment or heroes in the shop. This battle can be played either single or 2 player. Call a friend and start playing together!

title: Onet Monster Book
description:
A "match-the-pairs" genre game where you need to find matching images and connect them. But it's not that simple: there are tons of pictures, and you have to find the right ones.

Match all the books with the same little monsters on the covers — once you've paired them all, the level is complete! With over 100 levels, meditative gameplay, various cute monsters, and beautiful graphics. Play and relax!

title: Football Heads 2025
description: Unlock your potential and prove your skills. Outplay your opponents using powerful kicks and unique power-ups. Finally let them know who is the boss with the emotes system - become a football legend today!

You will need to successfully dodge obstacles, as well as disruptive players, and successfully collect more coins and keys. At the end of the game, throw the ball far enough to get more gold.

description: Welcome to the game in which every new tide carries a new wave of style! Help two girlfriends to celebrate the new beach season with dignity. Each of the girls has her own unique sense of fashion and style. Combine swimsuits with a variety of accessories to create unique summer looks. And don't forget to pick up a surfboard or a sapboard. Get ready for adventures on the water and to become the most stylish on the whole coast!

title: Block Puzzle King
description: Smart Puzzle Block is a classic elimination game. Its adorable graphics prevent eye strain, and varied level difficulties keep it engaging. The game maintains freshness while offering abundant props for players to strategically use.

title: Blue Girls Makeup
description: Experience the beauty world like never before with our Blue Girls Makeup game. It's time to unravel your creative side and weave makeup wizardry! This game allows you to dip your brush into a palette of possibilities, from stunning eyeshadow shades to gorgeous lipstick hues. Play it today and get the chance to experiment with different makeup techniques and spark your imagination. The Blue Girls Makeup game brings fun and fashion right at your fingertips. Dive in now!

title: Vibrant Hearts Glamour vs Punk
description: Two best girlfriends, Lily and Roxana, are striking opposites. Lily is the personification of tenderness and romance, dressed in airy pink dresses decorated with sequins and floral patterns. Roxanne is the true queen of punk rock, with her black leather dresses, gothic earrings and bold hairstyles. But do not forget about the third girlfriend, Melody, who masterfully combines both styles. Players will be able to experiment with outfits and choose which one is best suited for Valentine's Day!

title: Brother!Follow Me! - Merge Men
description:
It's a 3D running game where you control a runner as you navigate various obstacles, overcome challenges, and face off against a boss at the end of each level. This action-packed game combines exciting competitions, battles, and intense conflicts.

Collect and lead your brothers along the way, and grow your team to challenge the final game.

title: Brainrot World Hole.io
description: Brainrot World Hole.io is a hilarious casual hole game packed with chaotic brainrot energy and funny Italian meme vibes. Control a growing hole and dive into a crazy world where swallowing everything in sight is the key to victory. Move around the map and collect objects smaller than your hole.

title: Burger Tycoon
description: Start your journey as the owner of a small burger joint and work your way up to building a massive fast food empire! Take full control of every aspect of the business—from grilling delicious burgers and serving customers to managing staff and expanding your restaurant chain. Upgrade your kitchen, optimize your workflow, and attract more customers to grow your brand. Can you turn your humble burger stand into the ultimate fast food empire?

title: Mega Ramp Car
description:
Mega Ramp Car is a game with maximum speed and huge jumps! Are you ready to make the biggest leap in history?

Mega Ramp Car Features
- Realistic physics and sound effects.
- Real car collection
- This game allows you to perform amazing stunts on different jumps.
- Complete multiple levels and game modes for non-stop fun!
- You have to complete many challenging missions, which makes the game even more exciting.

Buy new cars to win new races.

title: Home Pin 1
description: Welcome to Home Pin: Pull Pin Loot Puzzle , you will play as Edward, the man who just moved into an abandoned house. Use your wisdom to help Edward defeat villains, save his wife, collect money and build the house. Only with your brain can you help him turn his abandoned house into the dream’s home of Edward's family.

title: Ragdoll Jump
description: Welcome to Ragdoll Jump! In this exciting jumping game, you will control a lovable stickman character on a thrilling journey out of a building. You will experience the sensation of soaring high as you jump and glide through the air, creating spectacular action sequences. Get ready for hilarious falls, and remember that you won't always land safely.

title: Tile Hex World: Red vs Blue
description:
Build and destroy!
Take part in an exciting battle between Blue and Red! This time, you will have to extract resources, construct buildings and even build entire islands!
To ​​fight the enemy, you will need to build a path to his island.
Chop down trees, process resources into building hexes, with which you can expand your territory!
The winner is the one who captures the enemy flag and subjugates the enemy army!

title: Daily Wordler
description:
Test your vocabulary and puzzle-solving skills with Daily Wordler, the ultimate word-guessing game that challenges your mind every day! With a simple yet addictive gameplay mechanic, Daily Wordler is perfect for fans of word games and brain teasers. 

Your goal is to guess the hidden word by entering valid words and using color-coded feedback to narrow down the solution. Yellow tiles indicate correct letters in the wrong position, while blue tiles signal correct letters in the right spot.

title: Steal Brainrot Duel
description: Steal Brainrot Duel is a fast, competitive collector-raider where you hunt for the best brainrot characters, defend your base from thieves, and outsmart rivals in Solo or 2 Player mode. Start with simple picks like Noobini Pizzanini, then grind your economy to unlock rare and legendary favorites such as Tralalero Tralala, Cocofanto Elefanto, and Graipussi Medussi. Build income, raid others, protect your stash, and style your obby avatar with hats, glasses, backpacks, wings, outfits, and pets!

title: Portal Hop
description: Portal Hop is a platform puzzle game where you carry a portal above your head and use it to solve tricky challenges! Move through each level by warping yourself onto higher platforms, collecting plus and minus power-ups to adjust the height of your portal. Think smart, plan your moves, and find the perfect path to reach your destination. Ready to warp your way to victory

title: Hill Climb Truck Transform Adventure
description: Hill Climb: Truck Transform Adventure is actually a 2D balance stunt adventure game. You have 3 kinds of vehicles to transform and overpass different terrains. While keeping the vehicle balanced, you can climb different ramps and terrains. If you crash obstacles or terrains, you can collect repair plates to recover. If you want to overpass the next harder levels, you can upgrade your vehicles with 4 acceleration abilities.

title: Obby Parkour Racing
description:
Welcome to Obby Parkour Racing – the game where speed, agility, and style collide to create the ultimate racing challenge!

Jump, grind, and dodge through dynamic obstacle courses on your snowboard! Prove your mastery in a world where parkour isn't just on foot
it's on a board. Every race is a new test, and only the fastest and most agile champions will claim victory.

title: Addiction Solitaire
description: A classic solitaire game using the full deck, featuring two difficulty modes: EASY and HARD. Enjoy polished animations and an intuitive card placement system that makes gameplay smooth and satisfying.

title: Dogs Spot The Differences
description: Immerse yourself in the charming world of 'Dogs: Spot the Differences,' a puzzle game featuring scenes filled with adorable companions. Challenge your observation skills, uncover subtle differences, and unlock new levels. With stunning visuals and escalating challenges, become a detective in a captivating journey of discovery and fun. Can you spot them all and become the ultimate enthusiast for your lovable companions?

title: Alien Intelligence Test
description: You've been abducted. To prove you're intelligent, aliens test you with strange puzzles and machines. Push buttons, solve challenges, survive the test.

title: Easter Shadow Match
description: It is an educational as well as fun game for kids. Just look the photo displayed in the left box and click correct shadow of the photo in right panels. Each time you select correct shadow, 200 points will be added to your score. On clicking the wrong shadow 40 points will be deducted from your score.

title: Devil Duck : Not a Troll Game
description: Devil Duck is an action-packed platformer game that challenges players to navigate through treacherous levels teeming with danger. Set in the fiery depths of the Devil's Domain, you play as a fearless adventurer on a quest to reclaim stolen treasures guarded by the sinister Devil King.

title: BFFs Luxury Loungewear
description: Get ready to style your way to comfort in the BFFs Luxury Loungewear game! Join the fun with Riri, Elsa, Polka, and Bonnie, each with a unique wardrobe. Choose from jersey cotton, knitted, velour, or silk sleepwear and accessories to create stylish sleepover outfits. Exercise your fashion skills and make every slumber party a plush, luxury affair. This game is perfect for budding fashionistas and dress-up game enthusiasts alike!

title: Wild West Match
description: Embark on a captivating Wild West adventure with Bonnie! Explore iconic landscapes, face challenges, and uncover secrets in this thrilling journey. The frontier spirit awaits – join Bonnie on the quest for an unforgettable adventure!

title: Bubble Shooter Pop
description: Get ready for a nostalgic blast from the past with Bubble Shooter Pop - Blast Fun, the ultimate classic bubble shooter game! Immerse yourself in a world of vibrant bubbles, addictive gameplay, and endless excitement.

title: Bitball
description:
A unique tile ball puzzle game from coin base bitcoin games loved by millions of players around the world. 
Make a lot of coins and become a rich. ?
 - Start with 10 and start making millions. ?
 - Coun you rech the topmillioners.❓
 - Play with friend together.?
 - Guess the ball where it will go.?

title: Paperly - Paper Plane Adventure
description:
Go on an exciting paper plane flight adventure, learn different flight mechanics & reach your destination.

PAPERLY: PAPER PLANE ADVENTURE - is all about Flying a Paper Plane, learning from previous mistakes, and Heading toward a Better Flight in this Physics-Driven Gameplay.

title: Erase the extra element
description: Sharpen your focus and logic in Erase the Extra Element! Erase parts of each scene to reveal clues and solve tricky visual puzzles.

title: Merge Run Battle
description: Merge Runner is an exciting merge game where you combine power and speed to win every challenge. Play a merge runner game with fun arcade merge game mechanics like those in cool math games or reminiscent of roblox and minecraft thrills. Upgrade heroes in an idle merge game and fight in a merge battle game. This merge and run game blends strategy and fast-paced action—perfect for fans of snake game challenges or quick kahoot-style fun.

title: Grass Land
description: Grass Land is a vibrant exploration game that drops you into a sprawling world of thick greenery and hidden surprises. Take control of your grass cutter, uncover valuable resources beneath the overgrowth, and build up your base as you roam the fields. Stay sharp, move fast, and make the most of every patch of grass you find.

title: 2048 Puzzle: Connect the Balls
Bubble Race Party
description:
Cute characters race on the platform to collect water drops and fill the pools. To use the aquapark slides you need to fill the mini pools. Collect water drops and try to knock down the opponents. To get better, you can use bombs, booster boxes and doors that give positive bonuses. Try to finish first in this fun race!

Game Features:
- Colorful and fun map designs
- 1 and 2 Player game modes
- Different hats available for characters
- Surprise bonuses and game mechanics

title: Flick Baseball Super Homerun
description:
Experience various baseball pitches based on the pendulum movement. The ball will fly further if you can hit the ball directly with the quick flick. Experience a “real-life like” batting simulation in this baseball game.
# One Flick Easy Control
You only use flick to control the batting for this game. The more accurate you flick your finger to hit the ball; it is more likely that you will be a home-run hitter.

title: Galactic Golf Solitaire
description:
Enjoy a relaxing round of Golf Solitaire, a fun and easy-to-play card game. The goal is to clear the board by matching cards that are one rank higher or lower than the one on the discard pile. Don’t worry about suits—just focus on the numbers! If you’re stuck, you can draw from the deck to keep the game going. Play at your own pace and see how many rounds you can win.

Perfect for a quick break or to unwind at the end of the day!

title: Nugget Man Survival Puzzle
description: Are you ready for adventure with the Nugget man character? To save the Nugget Man character who is stranded in the desert, you must fly into the sky without bursting the balloons. You must be careful to take the character to the finish by solving the puzzles before time runs out, accompanied by Gedagedago music. Rescue Nugget Man through desert bandits, cacti and many other challenging obstacles! Enjoy.

title: Doodle Dino Run
description: Doodle Dino Run delivers an addictive running adventure where you control a cute dinosaur, avoid dangers, and push your distance record farther every time you play. Featuring smooth side-scrolling gameplay, precise jump timing is essential to survive. Packed with action, this dinosaur adventure challenges your reflexes as the speed continuously increases.

title: Zombie Redemption
description: Zombie Redemption is an action-survival game set in a world where a failed experiment has turned most of humanity into zombies. Players earn gold by defeating zombies, which can be used to unlock stronger weapons. However, zombies also attack, making quick reflexes and strategic thinking essential for survival. Combining elements of strategy, action, and survival, this game offers an unforgettable adventure in the fight to save the world.

title: Roof Car Stunt
description: Challenging car game where you drive and collect coins. Jump around ramps, drive through various obstacles and drive into a giant pink donut to complete the level!

title: Twilight Solitaire TriPeaks
description: Step into the shadows with Twilight Solitaire TriPeaks! Explore abandoned castles, fend off lurking vampires, and rebuild forgotten halls. Play 200+ haunting Solitaire levels plus 50 chilling Mahjong boards. Face spooky twists like frozen and locked cards, tricky obstacles, and powerful boosts. Search the dark, cobwebby corners of every last level for gems and coins to purchase new castle upgrades and power-ups. Are you ready for a Solitaire adventure that sends shivers down your spine?

title: ASMR Pet Treatment
description: Take care of your adorable puppy and kitty in this relaxing ASMR game! Wash, heal, and pamper your pets with gentle treatments. After they feel happy and healthy, have fun dressing them up in cute outfits. Relaxing sounds and sweet pets make every moment enjoyable!

title: Crazy Motorcycle
description:
Drive Nubik along exciting tracks. Jump over gaps, go around obstacles and reach the finish line! Lots of different levels, drive a motorcycle, get there without destruction.

You have to drive a motorcycle with a noob and get to the finish line.
Jump over gaps and go around obstacles at high speed.
Exciting levels are waiting for you!

title: Magic Sort
description:
Welcome to Magic Sort! — a relaxing and satisfying color-sorting puzzle with a cute cat café twist!
Your job is to organize colorful water layers inside multiple bottles. Each bottle contains mixed colors, and you must pour them carefully to sort every color correctly. Remember:
You can only pour when the top layers are the same color.
Once a bottle is perfectly sorted and filled with a single color, it magically transforms into a finished drink for your adorable cat customers!

title: Army Defence Dino Shoot
description: Army Defence Dino Shoot is a third-person defense idle game. It seems that a lot of dinosaurs surround you. To protect the base from incoming dinosaurs, you can summon more soldiers and engineers to create a defensive line. Don't forget to upgrade your weapons, damage, and fire rate skills. The longer you hold this position, the more dinosaurs you will meet. Have a good time building a military base.

title: Hide & Seek Go And Find
description: Enjoy the classic game of Hide & Seek in a whole new way with 'Hide & Seek - Family Edition'! Play offline with up to five characters: mother, father, child, police, and thief, each with their unique role. Fathers seek their children, mothers search diligently, children hunt for hidden chocolates, police track down thieves, and thieves sneakily collect treasures.

title: Butterfly Triple
description:
Butterfly Tripple is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you merge cute butterflies!
Place the shapes on the board so that three or more butterflies of the same color touch each other. When they connect, they’re released and gracefully fly away. Vivid graphics, smooth animations, and a cozy atmosphere make the game a true pleasure to play.

title: Antistress - Simulator Of Sequins DIY
description: ASMR sequin simulator game offers a realistic stress relief experience. Immerse yourself in the world of sequins, where every touch feels real and sensory. The antistress simulator will allow you to relax while enjoying the visual and tactile effects.

title: Boost Your Brain!
description: "Boost Your Brain!" is an exciting incremental game where you develop your mind by collecting Aiku! Click the magic book, upgrade skills, collect pets with bonuses, and customize with skins. Enjoy deep progression, endless leveling, and cute companions. Reach new heights and become a genius!

title: Italian Brainrot Bike Rush
description: Hop on for chaotic fun in Italian Brainrot Bike Rush, a meme-filled obby bike platformer. Pick from 5 absurd meme legends and ride through floating platforms, deadly traps, and wild jumps. Play 5 levels across 3 modes—Normal, Challenge, and One Life. Collect coins, unlock checkpoints, and conquer brainrot chaos. Perfect for fans of meme-based bike racing and Italian brainrot platformers!

title: Super Kid Adventure
description: Hi there! It sounds like you're interested in playing Super Kid Adventure, an online game similar to Super Mario. To play, you'll need to jump on platforms, avoid obstacles and spikes, and defeat enemies. Don't forget to collect stars along the way! The game has 25 levels for you to explore, so there's plenty of adventure to be had.

title: Real Driving Simulator
description: Real Driving Simulator is a realistic driving simulation game that lets you fully enjoy the thrill of driving and racing! In this game, you can unblock various vehicles and drive them through cities and tracks. Experience the real feel of being behind the wheel.

title: Big Block Blast
description:
Place triangles and blocks to build 2x2 BIG BLOCKS! Drag and drop shapes into the grid to complete full squares made of triangles. Matching colors gives you bonus points, so in Big Block Blast you must aim for smart and colorful combos!
Some blocks have special powers and can even be placed on top of others. Use them strategically to unlock new moves and clear space. Big Block Blast is a simple to play game but tricky to master! How many BIG BLOCKS can you make?

title: Atlantic Sky Hunter Xtreme
description: Embark on an adrenaline-fueled journey across the open Atlantic ocean in Atlantic Sky Hunter, an arcade endless shoot 'em up airplane game where you'll face off against challenging UFOs and formidable bosses, armed with an array of power-ups including spray bullets, extra health, and twin missiles; how high can you soar in this thrilling shmup adventure?

title: Twisted Rope
description: Get ready for a mind-bending challenge! ? Twisted Rope Puzzle 3D is a captivating game that will put your problem-solving skills to the test. Dive into a colorful world of tangled ropes and work your way through increasingly complex puzzles.

title: Makeup Stack
description: Would you like to make up? How many cosmetic brands do you know? In this game, these questions will get the answers. Let's play Makeup Stack game to make up for the customers. You will pass the various doors that you can choose as you like. As long as you can complete the task, it doesn't matter what you choose. Let's try this game right now to make up more people!

title: Superhero Transform Change Race
description: Are you ready to be a superhero and have a racing adventure? In Superhero Transform - Change Race,you should run and transform! In the challenging track, you will incarnate different superheroes.  Use their special abilities to avoid obstacles and surpass opponents. Each transformation has a unique skill set. For example, you can become Spider-Man and climb rock. Turn into a shark and swim quickly to the next challenge; Turn into the Flash and sprint to the finish line, etc.

title: Mega Escape Car Parking Puzzle
description: A fun and compelling puzzle board game called Parking Jam. It's more than just parking; it's an enjoyable driving adventure that will advance you. Parking lot traffic jams, difficult parking conditions, irate seniors, and more. Play one of the best parking board games, earn rewards and unlock skins, solve harder and harder puzzles, decide which car to move to find smooth departs without hitting anybody or anything, characteristics.

title: Worms
description: Worms is a fun and addictive arcade puzzle where you control a cute worm and guide it through winding labyrinths. Your task is to lead the worm through the entire maze, collect rewards, use portals and avoid dead ends. Bright cartoon-style graphics and easy controls make the game perfect for both kids and adults. Worms combines fast arcade action with puzzle-solving logic, turning every new level into a fresh and exciting challenge.

title: Superwings ColorSwitch
description: Guide Mini Super Pet Golden Boy through space avoiding all the traps to move forward. Dodge circles, barriers, boxes, and all kinds of obstacles

title: Draw a path to the finish line!
description: Draw a path and lead your character to the finish line! Use your creativity and planning to avoid obstacles and reach your goal. Whether you're playing on a computer or phone, this fun puzzle game is all about finding smart and artistic ways to win. Great for all ages!

title: Alphabet Lore Maze
description: Alphabet Maze: Escape Letters is an exciting puzzle game that will help develop the struggle of minds and learn the letters of the alphabet. In this educational game you will explore the maze, defeating monsters, teddy bear and letter creatures. Choose characters from the collection that include Huggy, Teddy Bear, Harry and many other unique characters. To get out of the maze, you need to choose rooms with a smaller number than yours and avoid monsters larger than your level.

title: 2048 Number Match
description: Indulge your brain and enjoy puzzle-solving and number-matching. Achieve the highest possible score and boast about your brain-power!

title: Dan the Man
description: With a cracking funny story, action, an awesome upgradeable fighting skills and an epic arsenal of weapons that will make even the most heroic of heroes envious, Dan The Man's arcade fight fest has enough enemies and boss fights to satisfy every hardcore Action Platformer enthusiast and every indie game lover.
